title: iOS Utvecklare till B3 Mobile
description:
B3 Mobile är koncernens spetsbolag för apputveckling. Vi bygger framtidens digitala lösningar tillsammans med några av världens mest spännande kunder – i Stockholm och internationellt. Våra projekt spänner över iOS, Android, Kotlin, Swift, TypeScript, React Native, Java och mycket mer.
   

  

 Nu söker vi en erfaren iOS-utvecklare som vill ta nästa steg i karriären och bli en del av vårt passionerade team.
   

  

**Rollen**
 Hos oss får du arbeta nära andra skickliga utvecklare, UX-designers och projektledare – både in-house och ute hos kund. Vi vill inte bara bygga det kunden ber om, utan gärna leda utvecklingen, modernisera och driva på användandet av de senaste teknikerna inom iOS när det behövs.
   

  

 Vi jobbar primärt med Swift och SwiftUI, men erfarenhet av UIKit och andra delar av Apples ekosystem är alltid meriterande. Kännedom om Objective‑C kan vara värdefullt, men är inget krav.
   

  

**Vi letar efter dig som**
* Har minst 6 års erfarenhet av iOS-utveckling
* Har mycket goda kunskaper i Swift, SwiftUI och Xcode
* Har erfarenhet av UIKit och gärna insyn i övriga delar av ekosystemet
* Har vana av byggautomatisering (t.ex. Fastlane, Xcode Cloud)
* Har dokumenterad erfarenhet av testning och unittester (Swift Testing, XCTest)
* Skriver ren, hållbar, läsbar, säker, modulär och testbar kod
* Är proaktiv och gillar att ta initiativ hos kund
* Har en bakgrund som civilingenjör eller motsvarande erfarenhet
* Talar och skriver svenska obehindrat


**Därför ska du välja oss**
 Vi erbjuder mer än bara ett jobb – hos oss får du:
   

  

* Möjlighet att jobba med tekniskt utmanande lösningar för högprofilerade kunder.
* Friheten att alltid ha de bästa verktygen: snabb dator, gott om testtelefoner, rätt tangentbord, alla kablar och licenser du behöver – på eget initiativ.
* Flexibelt upplägg med hybridmodell (en dag i veckan på kontoret för gemenskap och kunskapsutbyte).
* En arbetsplats där du kan växa och utforska de senaste teknikerna tillsammans med ett starkt team.
* Satsningar på ditt välmående – från friskvårdsbidrag till en arbetsmiljö där balans mellan jobb och fritid är en självklarhet.


 Vi tror på energi, nyfikenhet och att dela erfarenheter. Hos oss är olikheter en styrka, och vi vill att du ska känna att du kan växa – både som utvecklare och som människa.
   

  

 För mer information kontakta VD Camilla Landén på camilla.landen@b3.se

title: Systemarkitekt/Lösningsarkitekt med tyngd inom .NET Azure
description:
Vill du vara med och forma framtidens lösningar tillsammans med kunniga och engagerade kollegor inom B3-koncernen? Trivs du med att ta ett helhetsgrepp, tänka långsiktigt och guida kunder till de bästa tekniska besluten?
   

  

 Du kommer ha runt 25 härliga och drivna kollegor i vårt lilla bolag och ca 1000 medarbetare till om du så önskar inom B3-koncernen.
   

  

 På B3 CodeRight är vi utvecklare och arkitekter med en genomsnittlig arbetslivserfarenhet på över 15 år. Vi har en kultur där kunskapsdelning, gemenskap och balans i livet är självklarheter.
   

  

**Vem vi söker:**
 Du är en erfaren system- eller lösningsarkitekt med stor erfarenhet inom Microsoftstacken, som drivs av att skapa hållbara och framtidssäkra lösningar.
   

  

 Du tycker om att arbeta nära kund och bidra redan i ett tidigt skede av projekten där dina råd verkligen gör skillnad. Du är nyfiken, kommunikativ och lösningsorienterad, och du har en god förmåga att föra dialog med kund samt omsätta affärsbehov till smarta tekniska lösningar.
   

  

**Krav:**
* Minst 10 års erfarenhet inom IT-branschen, varav minst 3 år som IT-arkitekt (Lösningsarkitekt, Systemarkitekt, Integrationsarkitekt)
* Erfarenhet av systemutveckling, gärna inom Microsoftstacken (C#, .NET, Azure)
* God förståelse för molnarkitektur, gärna inom Azure
* Mycket goda kunskaper i svenska och engelska (tal och skrift)
* God kunskap av moderna arkitekturmönster


**Meriterande:**
* Erfarenhet av rådgivande roller eller arbete som konsult
* Erfarenhet av säkerhetsarkitektur och compliance/regelverk


 Hos oss får du stor frihet, attraktiva villkor och alla möjligheter att växa - både som individ och i team.
   

  

 Låter det som du? Skicka din ansökan nu!

title: Senior hyresadministratör till Prisma Properties
description:
Vill du vara en del av ett av Sveriges ledande fastighetsbolag och utvecklare inom lågprishandel? Som senior hyresadministratör
 
 på Prisma Properties får du en central roll i att säkerställa korrekt och effektiv administration av våra kommersiella hyresavtal. Här möter du ett börsnoterat bolag med högt tempo, korta beslutsvägar och en kultur som präglas av engagemang, framåtanda och arbetsglädje. Rekryteringen sker i samarbete med Isaksson Rekrytering.
 



  





**Uppdraget** 




 Rollen innebär nära samarbete med affärsutvecklare, fastighetschefer, förvaltare och externa parter såsom hyresgäster och entreprenörer. Tjänsten är placerad i Stockholm. För dig som bor i närheten av Helsingborg finns möjlighet att arbeta från vårt kontor där.
 



  





 I denna roll får du ett brett och ansvarsfullt uppdrag där du:
 


* upprättar, granskar och administrerar kommersiella hyresavtal i nära samarbete med affärsutvecklare, fastighetschefer med bistånd av intern jurist om behov finns
* säkerställer att avtal följer interna rutiner och juridiska riktlinjer
* hanterar hyresjusteringar, indexeringar och uppsägningar
* ansvarar för att hyresregister och digitala system är uppdaterade och korrekta
* fungerar som kontaktperson gentemot hyresgäster i administrativa frågor
* stöttar förvaltningsteamet i dokumentation, rapportering och kommunikation



  





**Din profil** 




 Du är strukturerad, självgående och lösningsorienterad med förmåga att skapa ordning och kvalitet i alla led. Rollen kräver att du kan växla mellan tempo och detaljer med bibehållen precision. Du trivs i en affärsnära miljö, tar egna initiativ och har lätt att bygga relationer både internt och externt.
 



  





**Kvalifikationer** 



* Relevant eftergymnasial utbildning
* Lång erfarenhet av hyresadministration eller liknande roll inom kommersiella fastigheter
* Mycket god förståelse för kommersiella hyresavtal och hyresjuridik
* Erfarenhet av lokaler — gärna inom big box, stand alone eller handelsplatser
* Stark administrativ förmåga och trygg i digitala system
* Goda kunskaper i Word, Excel och ekonomisystem
* Flytande svenska i tal och skrift; engelska är meriterande



  





 Erfarenhet från bolag som utvecklar eller bygger fastigheter är meriterande
 



  





**Om Prisma Properties** 




 Prisma Properties är en ledande ägare och utvecklare av moderna handelsfastigheter i Norden. Företaget fokuserar på fastigheter för dagligvaror, lågprisbutiker och QSR-segmentet (snabbservice-restauranger). Idag äger vi cirka 160 fastigheter i Sverige, Danmark och Finland med målet att växa ytterligare i hela Norden. Med fokus på långsiktighet, hållbarhet och tillgänglighet investerar Prisma Properties i framtidens handelsplatser och snabbladdningsstationer för elbilar i anslutning till motorvägar och andra trafiknära lägen. Prisma Properties aktier är noterade på Nasdaq Stockholm Mid Cap under tickerkoden PRISMA och bolaget har sitt huvudkontor i Stockholm. Läs mer på: prismaproperties.se.

**Experienced Game Designer - Victoria 3**
==========================================


Apply for this job


#### ***Are you a creative and dedicated games industry professional with experience in game design and a passion for strategy games? Are you interested in Paradox Grand Strategy Games and eager to help us take them to the next level? Then you may be the one we’re looking for!***

**About the Role**
------------------


As a Game Designer working with the Paradox Development Studio in Stockholm, you will be an on-site project team member involved in designing gameplay features and systems under the guidance of the Game Director. You will have a direct and influential impact on the quality and feel of the game.


We are seeking new employees who enjoy working in a team where everyone supports each other, but where you are also given the freedom and responsibility to take charge of a task and deliver. We care about quality and are motivated by the idea of our many fans around the world praising your work after release. You will thrive in a modern, creative environment where people working with you love their jobs and the games we make.

**Relationships**
-----------------

* The Game Designer will have the Operations Manager as their direct manager while collaborating closely with the Design Lead and Game Director on day-to-day tasks, priorities, and design direction
* Collaboration with a multidisciplinary team (other designers, programmers, artists, production, and QA) to lead task breakdown and estimation, ensure quality through continuous playtesting and iteration, and optimize design, system efficiency, and content quality
* Engagement on various levels to identify and solve design problems, e.g., fanbase, other Paradox designers and Game Directors, user research, and analytics team

**Responsibilities**
--------------------

* Design and implement new game systems and features
* Help to deliver the creative vision set by the Game Director
* Write and maintain design documentation
* Come up with your own ideas and creative contributions
* Work closely with other members of the team to make sure that implementation is done according to the design
* Be autonomous and proactive in your work
* Coaching junior designers and providing constructive feedback on their work
* Delegation of less complex tasks to junior designers
* Uphold good relationships within the team with a clear understanding of expectations for the game we are making

**Required Qualifications**
---------------------------

* At least three years of professional games industry experience in Game Design
* A demonstrable experience with complex system and feature designs
* Ability to work highly independently with assigned tasks and take responsibility for delivering game design specifications according to the project’s schedule
* A solid understanding of core loops and player experience
* A genuine passion for strategy games and Paradox games in particular
* Fluent in spoken and written English
* Excellent communication and collaboration skills to work and inspire in a team environment

**As a bonus, you might have**
------------------------------

* An academic or personal interest in history, economics, and/or politics
* Experience with programming or scripting
* Experience with creating mods for Paradox games
* Experience with other strategy games
* Tertiary skills in related fields such as UX, Art, or Sound

**Practical Information**
-------------------------


Please make sure you include a cover letter where you outline why you want to join Paradox, what level of experience with Paradox games you have, and what other games you play.


We would like your application to include any relevant work samples and/or a link to your portfolio if you have one. We are especially interested in examples of gameplay systems and related work that you have previously designed or implemented.


Join Paradox and help us shape Victoria 3! Design rich systems, create meaningful historical events, and build stories players will remember.

title: Business Solution Architect (Pega)
description:
### **Responsibilities**


* Lead the business architecture and design of Pega-based solutions, ensuring alignment with business goals and optimal user experience.
* Collaborate with business stakeholders to define requirements and translate complex business processes into effective Pega solutions.
* Provide leadership and mentorship to business analysts, process designers, and cross-functional teams.
* Ensure solutions comply with business standards, governance frameworks, and enterprise architecture principles.
* Work hands-on with solution design, including:

* High-Level Design (HLD) documentation.


* Layer Cake design.


* Pega Case Type design.


* Data model definition.


* System integrations.


* Drive Pega application design and setup, including Layer Cake architecture and Case Types.
* Support agile/SAFe delivery, including sprint planning, user stories, backlog management, and UX collaboration.


**Required Skills**


* Minimum 5 years of experience in Pega business architecture and business process design.
* Pega Certified Business Architect (PCBA) certification.
* Strong understanding of Pega business design principles and case management implementation strategies.
* Proven experience translating complex business requirements into structured Pega solutions.
* Experience driving Pega application design, including Layer Cake architecture and Case Type implementation.
* Experience working in Agile or SAFe environments, including managing user stories, backlog, and sprint execution.
* Strong knowledge of business process integration patterns and customer journey mapping.
* Experience working in financial services or other regulated industries, with a solid understanding of compliance requirements.
* Excellent communication and stakeholder management skills, with the ability to influence and engage business leaders at all levels.
* Demonstrated ownership and accountability when delivering complex business transformation initiatives.
* Experience within the banking industry.

title: House Engineering Manager -Cloud Diagrams
description:
**Location**  

Our House Engineering Manager will be an integral part of our Engineering Leadership team in EMEA. This role is based remotely in the UK, Ireland, Sweden, Estonia or Israel.
  

  

**Who We Are**  

DoiT is a global technology company that works with cloud-driven organizations to leverage the cloud to drive business growth and innovation. We combine data, technology, and human expertise to ensure our customers operate in a well-architected and scalable state - from planning to production.
  

Delivering DoiT Cloud Intelligence, the only solution that integrates advanced technology with human intelligence, we help our customers solve complex multicloud problems and drive efficiency.  

With decades of multicloud experience, we have specializations in Kubernetes, GenAI, CloudOps, and more. An award-winning strategic partner of AWS, Google Cloud, and Microsoft Azure, we work alongside more than 4,000 customers worldwide.


**The Opportunity**  

The House Engineering Manager is a hands-on leadership role centered on enablement and delivery. Your primary responsibility is to ensure the House consistently delivers on its commitments by unblocking engineers, maintaining focus, and creating an environment where the team can perform at its highest potential.This is a technical role: you are expected to review engineering work, provide clear technical direction, and contribute to the codebase when needed.The balance between technical contribution and leadership depends on the team's context, but your overarching mandate is to enable the team and own the execution and delivery of the House by having in-depth understanding and to be able to in-practice be hands-on on the team domain.  

Learn more about **Cloud Diagrams**


**Responsibilities**  

Team leadership


* Leading a team of 5 to 10 engineers
* Driving ceremonies and the day-to-day operations of the team.
* Be the enabler of the team, ensure team members are unblocked as quickly as possible and that they are clear about what they need to deliver and on the value that the delivery will bring to our users.
* You are responsible for the professional well-being and career development of team members
* Successful team leadership is about ensuring team members succeed in their roles. As such, you will manage team member performance and provide continuous feedback and mentoring.


Technical leadership


* You will help ensure high-quality production releases by actively supporting the engineering release process, monitoring deployments, and upholding the standards of the Production branch
* You and your team members are expected to review pull requests thoroughly and provide clear, actionable, and constructive feedback that elevates the team's technical quality.
* You will lead and collaborate with the team on technical design discussions, ensuring alignment on architecture and implementation approaches, while maintaining the ability to both oversee high-level technical activities and dive deep into hands-on details when needed.
* You will drive and own the technical roadmap of the team, assessing technical debts and assuring that the components of the team are scaling and are in healthy state
* AI-Driven mindset is required and as a leader you will be expected to keep evolving the team around AI driven development.


Roadmap & delivery


* You will work closely with the Technical Product Owner and UI/UX Designer to define, plan, and structure each sprint, ensuring priorities are well understood and that the house commits to a focused, valuable, and achievable delivery. You are expected to understand the broader business objectives behind the work, translate this context for the team, and ensure that engineering efforts clearly align with those objectives.
* As part of your delivery ownership, you and the Technical Product Owner will plan for incoming business needs and maintain a house level roadmap that is aligned with product and reflects both near-term priorities and longer-term direction.
* You and the Technical Product Owner will balance sprint commitments with customer-facing responsibilities by driving the resolution of incoming support tickets, setting clear expectations for timelines, and prioritizing effectively so that customer needs are addressed while maintaining healthy sprint execution.
* Follow a AI-Driven software development lifecycle, having human driving design and assuring quality while having AI running the implementation (engineers own, plan, review and AI executes).
* Day-to-day communication and collaboration
* **Upwards:** Communicate clearly and succinctly, giving leadership the right level of context and prioritizing escalations based on well-gathered, relevant information.
* **Downwards:** Empower Senior Engineers to own key areas of the product and coach team members through their daily interactions to stay focused, intentional, and aware of their impact.
* **Sideways:** Collaborate effectively with other Houses, raising challenges and opportunities in a clear, constructive manner to support cross-team alignment, stability, and shared understanding.


**Qualifications**


* Proven experience leading an engineering team (typically 5+ engineers) in a delivery-focused environment (3+ Years)
* Past experience as a software engineer for at least 5+ years.
* Strong hands-on technical background with the ability to review code, guide design decisions, and dive deep when needed.
* Experience owning delivery and execution, including sprint planning, backlog management, and release readiness.
* AI-Driven mindset, defaulting to AI while ensuring quality and consistency
* Demonstrated ability to mentor, coach, and grow engineers through regular feedback and performance management.
* Strong communication skills, with the ability to translate business context into clear technical direction for the team.
* Experience working in a SaaS, cloud-native, or distributed systems environment.


Technical Experience


* Strong hands-on experience with **Node.js** (backend services, APIs, real-time systems).
* Strong hands-on experience with **React** (complex state management, performance optimization, large-scale front-end applications).
* Deep understanding of modern web architecture, including SPA frameworks, client-server communication patterns, and browser performance considerations.
* Solid experience designing and operating systems in **cloud environments (AWS, GCP, Azure)**.
* Practical experience with **Kubernetes (K8s)**, including cluster architecture, workload orchestration, and production troubleshooting.
* Strong understanding of **cloud networking fundamentals**, including:
* + VPCs, subnets, routing tables
	+ Load balancers and ingress controllers
	+ Security groups and firewall rules
	+ DNS and service discovery
* Clear understanding of **network plumbing across clouds and VPCs**, including:
* + Cross-cloud connectivity patterns
	+ Peering, private links, VPNs, and hybrid networking
	+ Identity and access boundaries across providers
* Familiarity with Infrastructure as Code tools such as Terraform or similar.
* Understanding of distributed systems concepts including consistency, availability, observability, and fault tolerance.
* Strong knowledge of system reliability, performance tuning, and production incident management.


Bonus Points


* Experience in cloud native applications
* Hands-on experience with more than a single cloud provider
* Background in scaling teams, processes, or technical systems as the organization grows.


**Are you a Do'er?**  

Be your truest self. Work on your terms. Make a difference.
  

We are home to a global team of incredible talent who work remotely and have the flexibility to have a schedule that balances your work and home life. We embrace and support leveling up your skills professionally and personally.
  

What does being a Do'er mean? We're all about being entrepreneurial, pursuing knowledge, and having fun! Click here to learn more about our core values.
  

Sounds too good to be true? Check out our Glassdoor Page.  

We thought so too, but we're here and happy we hit that 'apply' button.
  

  

Full-time employee benefits include:


* Unlimited Vacation
* Flexible Working Options
* Health Insurance
* Parental Leave
* Employee Stock Option Plan
* Home Office Allowance
* Professional Development Stipend
* Peer Recognition Program


**Many Do'ers, One Team**  

DoiT unites as *Many Do'ers, One Team*, where diversity is more than a goal—it's our strength. We actively cultivate an inclusive, equitable workplace, recognizing that each unique perspective enhances our innovation. By celebrating differences, we create an environment where every individual feels valued, contributing to our collective success.

title: Tech Lead
description:
**Teach Lead – Healthcare Software**  

  

**Make your next move matter**  

  

We are looking for an experienced Tech Lead to accelerate the development, deployment, and scaling of next‑generation digital health solutions.
In this role, you will collaborate with data scientists, clinicians, and product teams to turn insights into real‑world impact, faster and smarter. If you are passionate about cloud-native engineering, responsible AI, and using cutting‑edge technologies to advance global health, keep on reading.  

  

Our aim is to establish a full new team of 10 dedicated colleagues, all committed to build a strong team and deliver the extraordinary in our aim to innovate and build the next generation digital health solutions. We believe we do this in close day-to-day collaboration in the headquarters of Mölnlycke, situated in GoCo, Mölndal/Gothenburg. **What you’ll do**
As the Tech Lead, in close collaboration with Project Manager, UX & UI Designer you will lead the delivery of digital products within the Wound Care portfolio, providing strong technical leadership across initiatives.  

You will lead, guide and mentor the team of developers in the day-to day decisions and the sprint deliveries for the Healthcare software development in Digital Solutions. With your strong technical experience you will hands on contribute to coding, prototypes, and proof of concepts.  

In your role you will influence ways of working when starting up a full new team and make key decisions on technology, architecture, and solution design to maintain flexibility and alignment with evolving business needs. You will role model by staying current on relevant technologies, business processes, platforms, and data and then share this expertise across the team and broader organisation.  

  

**Other key responsibilities for the role:*** Actively contribute to DevOps practices, support and mentor the team in software development, architecture, engineering, and best practices.
* Create and maintain architectural documentation and software development artefacts, ensuring they meet the required technical and business standards.
* Advocate and embed best practice architecture and engineering standards enabling robust, sustainable, and well structured technical solutions.
* Ensure architectural consistency with domain architecture, to protect the quality, scalability, and security of solutions.

 **If all that sounds appealing, then here is what we would like you to demonstrate:*** University degree, preferably in Software Engineering, Computer Science, Information Technology, or other relevant area, or equivalent mix of education and experience
* Significant experience managing digital or software development projects within a highly regulated environment
* Strong background in agile methodologies and DevOps practices across the full software delivery lifecycle
* High technical proficiency with cutting edge technologies and solution architecture.
* Full stack development skills: Frontend including JavaScript frameworks (Vue, Angular, React) and Backend including .NET, Python, SQL.
* Strong experience with API oriented architecture, system integrations, and API management.
* Skilled in DevOps toolchains such as GitHub and Azure DevOps.
* Knowledge of IoT services and scalable cloud/on prem platforms.
* Experience developing and integrating AI driven solutions (LLMs, agents, Copilot style assistants).
* Knowledge in Identity Access Management (IAC) with focus on external services like Azure B2C & External Entra Id

 **Additional experience we see as a benefit for the role:*** Experience with event driven and real time communication technologies (EventHub, Kafka, SignalR)
* Cloud expertise with Azure and AWS; containerisation using Docker and Kubernetes.
* Awareness of regulatory and compliance requirements for Software as a Medical Device (SaMD).
* Understanding of healthcare software standards and protocols (HL7, FHIR, OpenEHR).

 **What can we offer you?*** A collaborative environment with friendly colleagues in a global organisation that values openness, fairness, and teamwork.
* Competitive benefits package: annual bonus, pension plan, health insurance, and wellness contribution.
* A great workplace in the beautiful new head quarter in the GoCo, Mölndal. A place you gladly spend the required 3 days in office per week.
* Flexible working hours and a supportive work-from-home policy.

 **Our approach to Diversity and Inclusion**
We’re building a workplace where everyone feels seen, heard, and valued. We believe that a diverse mix of people (from different cultures, ages, geographies, and genders) makes us stronger. It brings fresh perspectives, drives better decisions, and helps us deliver solutions that reflect the world we serve. Inclusion isn’t just a value, it’s how we work, grow, and lead together.  

Please contact a future colleague Thomas Osberg, thomas.osberg@molnlycke.com,
Domain Architect Digital Enablement, if you have any questions about the role. **Please submit your application by April 12, 2026.**

title: UX/UI Designer
description:
**UX & UI Designer**  

  

**Make your next move matter**

  

We are looking for an experienced UX & UI Designer to accelerate the development, user experience, and scaling of next‑generation digital health solutions.


In this role, you will collaborate with data scientists, clinicians, and product teams to turn insights into real‑world impact, faster and smarter. If you are passionate about improve the quality of life, not only for patients, but also for those who care for them, using responsible AI, and using cutting‑edge technologies to advance global health, keep on reading.  

  

Our aim is to establish a full new team of 10 dedicated colleagues, all committed to build a strong team and deliver the extraordinary in our aim to innovate and build the next generation digital health solutions. We believe we do this in close day-to-day collaboration in the headquarters of Mölnlycke, situated in GoCo, Mölndal/Gothenburg.

 **What you’ll do**


As a UX & UI Designer in Digital Solutions you lead the design work end-to-end, from discovery to execution with support from peers in the UX Guild. As a strong collaborator and communicator, you will work together with the software development team helping them understand user needs and UX principles and turn them into usable solutions that creates impact. You’ll contribute to initiatives and day-to-day work through user centred research and design methodology and skills, in close collaboration with product owner, engineers, and other teams and stakeholders across the organisation.


Through your work the team will meet the users where they are and work to solve their problems in a coordinated and efficient way. You will facilitate an in-depth understanding of the end users’ needs and motivations, through insights, brainstorming, research, and workshops. Together with the team you will convert it into appealing, highly usable interfaces of digital products, e.g. mobile and web applications, to deliver an impactful user experience. You'll advocate for the users with a high level of craft and exceptional service design.  

  

**Other key responsibilities for the role:*** Develop visual prototypes, when appropriate, or other relevant tests with users and customers.
* Responsible for preparation and execution of testing with users securing user satisfaction and validation of business value.
* Contributes to development and implementation of the global IT strategy including digital vision, mission and digital technology innovation roadmap.
* Develop and maintain expertise in relevant areas including requirement management, prototyping, customer and user testing methods, best practice, and relevant technologies, applications, and data.

 **What you bring**

* Bachelor's or master's degree in computer science, interface design, user experience design, human computer interaction or equivalent education.
* 5+ years experience , so you understand all aspects of product architecture, interaction and visual design, and UX research.
* You have a strong technological understanding and can easily navigate limitations and possibilities to set direction for achievable and excellent user experiences for the short and long term.
* Proficiency and experience from working in Figma.
* When faced with uncertainty or complexity, you have a proven knack for innovation methods that help build empathy, clarity and simplicity.
* You seek to understand your user groups and build great tools to make their work and lives easier.
* You are a systems thinker and can build solutions that work as part of a larger ecosystem of tools. You can move nimbly between digital journeys and real-world, face-to-face customer experiences.
* You are a strong collaborator and communicator, who can inspire and work with not only design partners, but many other stakeholders from marketing to engineering.
* You have a people-focused design mentality. You are constantly looking to hone your design instinct through user feedback, whether that’s hands-on user research or a quantitative A/B test.
* You have a portfolio (or work samples) of relevant past projects.
* High proficiency in English.

 **What can we offer you?*** A collaborative environment with friendly colleagues in a global organisation that values openness, fairness, and teamwork.
* Competitive benefits package: annual bonus, pension plan, health insurance, and wellness contribution.
* A great workplace in the beautiful new head quarter in the GoCo, Mölndal. A place you gladly spend the required 3 days in office per week.
* Flexible working hours and a supportive work-from-home policy.

 **Our approach to Diversity and Inclusion**


We’re building a workplace where everyone feels seen, heard, and valued. We believe that a diverse mix of people (from different cultures, ages, geographies, and genders) makes us stronger. It brings fresh perspectives, drives better decisions, and helps us deliver solutions that reflect the world we serve. Inclusion isn’t just a value, it’s how we work, grow, and lead together.  

Please contact our lead of the UX/UI Design Guild, Digital Area Manager Louise Hellström, Louise.Hellstrom@molnlycke.com if you have any questions about the role. **Please submit your application by April 12, 2026.**

title: Technical Lead
description:
At Tata Technologies we make product development dreams a reality by designing, engineering and validating the products of tomorrow for the world’s leading manufacturers. Due to our continued growth, we are now recruiting for a Technical Lead to strengthen our team in Gothenburg.
  
Role Overview
  
The OBC Verification & Validation Engineer is responsible for the complete testing, verification, and validation of a new 7kW (US/JPN) / 11kW (Global) On‑Board Charger for the SPA1 XLR PHEV (526B) program. The role covers component-level verification, customer function validation, charging compatibility tests, and participation in expedition and climate testing.
  
Key Responsibilities
  
Perform verification of OBC component and system requirements.
  
Conduct HIL and in‑vehicle functional testing.
  
Execute charging compatibility tests with various wallboxes.
  
Carry out robustness and IEC 61000 compliance testing.
  
**Validate customer functions:** UX, mobile app charging, CSD charging settings.
  
Support expedition testing (heat, cold, Norway IT‑Grid).
  
Deliver acceptance tests for new software releases and requirement verification reports.
  
  

Tools & Skill Set
  
INCA + MDA
  
CANalyzer
  
DSA
  
HIL rigs & test vehicles
  
  

Required Competencies
  
Essential
  
Swedish Driving License – Category B (Mandatory)
  
Required due to extensive vehicle testing under varying conditions.
  
  

Technical
  
Strong knowledge of EV charging systems or power electronics.
  
Experience with HIL environments and vehicle testing.
  
Understanding of EMC/EMI standards (IEC 61000 beneficial).
  
Ability to analyze logs, signals, and diagnostic data.
  
  

Behavioral
  
Strong problem‑solving mindset and analytical skills.
  
Ability to work independently while collaborating with cross‑functional teams.
  
Comfortable working in varied test environments (heat, cold, expeditions).
  
  

If you are passionate about bringing innovation to the projects you work on then we would love to hear from you.
  
  

**Tata Technologies:** Engineering a better world.
  
  

Tata Technologies would like to thank all applicants for their interest; each application will be reviewed against the set criteria for the role. We would like to advise that only candidates under consideration will be contacted. If you do not hear from us within 10 working days following the closing date it will mean that unfortunately your application has not been successful. We will however retain your details for any suitable future opportunities.

title: Test Engineer
description:
At Tata Technologies we make product development dreams a reality by designing, engineering and validating the products of tomorrow for the world’s leading manufacturers. Due to our continued growth, we are now recruiting for a Test Engineer to strengthen our team in Gothenburg.
  
Role Overview
  
The OBC Verification & Validation Engineer is responsible for the complete testing, verification, and validation of a new 7kW (US/JPN) / 11kW (Global) On‑Board Charger for the SPA1 XLR PHEV (526B) program. The role covers component-level verification, customer function validation, charging compatibility tests, and participation in expedition and climate testing.
  
Key Responsibilities
  
Perform verification of OBC component and system requirements.
  
Conduct HIL and in‑vehicle functional testing.
  
Execute charging compatibility tests with various wallboxes.
  
Carry out robustness and IEC 61000 compliance testing.
  
**Validate customer functions:** UX, mobile app charging, CSD charging settings.
  
Support expedition testing (heat, cold, Norway IT‑Grid).
  
Deliver acceptance tests for new software releases and requirement verification reports.
  
  

Tools & Skill Set
  
INCA + MDA
  
CANalyzer
  
DSA
  
HIL rigs & test vehicles
  
  

Required Competencies
  
Essential
  
Swedish Driving License – Category B (Mandatory)
  
Required due to extensive vehicle testing under varying conditions.
  
  

Technical
  
Strong knowledge of EV charging systems or power electronics.
  
Experience with HIL environments and vehicle testing.
  
Understanding of EMC/EMI standards (IEC 61000 beneficial).
  
Ability to analyze logs, signals, and diagnostic data.
  
  

Behavioral
  
Strong problem‑solving mindset and analytical skills.
  
Ability to work independently while collaborating with cross‑functional teams.
  
Comfortable working in varied test environments (heat, cold, expeditions).
  
  

If you are passionate about bringing innovation to the projects you work on then we would love to hear from you.
  
  

**Tata Technologies:** Engineering a better world.
  
  

Tata Technologies would like to thank all applicants for their interest; each application will be reviewed against the set criteria for the role. We would like to advise that only candidates under consideration will be contacted. If you do not hear from us within 10 working days following the closing date it will mean that unfortunately your application has not been successful. We will however retain your details for any suitable future opportunities.

title: Industrial Design Internship
description:
Above is now looking for talented Industrial Design Interns to join the creative team in both our Malmö & Stockholm studios throughout 2026. The next intake will be around February/March, as well as in August/September post-summer - but we are open to discussing individual setups outside the usual cycle. Our internships are always on-site for best exposure and collaboration, and we require a duration of 5-6 months to really get to know each other.
   

  

**Job Description**
 As an Industrial Design Intern at Above, you will get the opportunity to work with multi-disciplinary project teams on a wide variety of cutting-edge design & innovation projects for some of the world's most exciting brands.
   

  

 Once here, you will be an integral part of our design team, and have the opportunity to proactively contribute to all stages of the design process, from research to concept definition, from hands-on prototyping to crafting compelling visions. With strong conceptual thinking and a fluid software toolbox, you will have the opportunity to shape excellent project deliveries through craft and creativity. You will get the chance to work on focused industrial design engagements, and equally integrate into larger, cross-functional project constellations as part of diverse, mixed-competency teams - acting as an ambassador of the industrial design discipline while collaborating with senior colleagues.
   

  

 Our work is exciting and diverse in nature, spanning high-volume consumer products, smart home devices, furniture, robotics, future mobility experiences, progressive healthcare solutions, packaging and many more. We create impact across all levels and horizons - from category-defining hero products to multi-dimensional portfolio strategies and shaping compelling future visions alike.
   

  

**What We Are Looking For**
* An inspiring design portfolio; strong conceptual thinking and creativity
* Aesthetic sensibility balanced with a thoughtful, user-centered design approach
* Ability to adapt methods, thought-process and approach to project needs
* Fluency in CAD (Solidworks, Rhino or similar), including surfacing skills
* High-quality visualisation & animation output to express ideas and tell stories
* Hands-on mentality and familiarity with physical front-end prototyping
* Curiosity for sustainability, material innovation & manufacturing processes
* A humble, self-driven and optimistic attitude; willingness and desire to learn
* Team player, with good verbal & visual communication skills


 We are also very much interested in receiving applications from individuals that bridge disciplines or have unique profiles in-between the traditional molds - let’s talk!
   

  

**Join our team**
 Please submit your portfolio and short motivation statement. Interviews are happening on a rolling basis. Applications without a portfolio will not be considered. Our internships are always paid, and we are able to offer support with visa & work permit processes for successful international candidates.
   

  

 We’re looking forward to hearing from you!

title: Graphic Designer (fixed-term)
description:
**YOUR MISSION AT VOI**
 We’re looking for a creative and detail‑oriented
 **Graphic Designer** 
 to join our Tender team on a 12‑month fixed‑term contract. You’ll support our Senior Designer and the Commercial team by creating clear, engaging visual communication across print and digital – this is a graphic design role, not UX.
   

  

 You’ll Help Produce High‑quality Assets For Both Internal And External Use, From Tenders And Presentations To Marketing Campaigns And Social Media Content. This Will Include
   

  

* Owning parts of the design and layout of tender documents and commercial proposals, ensuring clarity, quality and visual impact.
* Creating and refining Google Slides presentations in line with brand guidelines and commercial objectives.
* Developing and delivering visual assets for marketing campaigns across online and offline channels.
* Producing high‑quality print and digital materials (e.g. stickers, hangers, brochures, social media graphics) with a strong focus on consistency and craft.
* Collaborating closely with the Commercial team to ensure all materials are visually aligned with the brand identity and support business goals.
* Contributing ideas and constructive feedback in creative sessions and team discussions.
* Taking ownership of day‑to‑day graphic design initiatives, supporting team priorities and suggesting improvements.


**WHAT YOU NEED TO EMBARK**
 You are a collaborative designer with strong visual skills, a structured way of working and an interest in clear, accessible communication. You enjoy working with others, managing several projects at once, and delivering well‑crafted work.
   

  

* Strong proficiency in Adobe Creative Suite (InDesign, Photoshop, Illustrator,), Figma and Google Workspace (Docs, Sheets, Slides).
* Solid understanding of graphic design principles, layout, typography and colour theory.
* A portfolio showcasing your work in branding, marketing or visual design (longer‑form documents and/or presentations is a plus).
* Ability to manage multiple deadlines with strong attention to detail.
* A collaborative, proactive mindset and eagerness to learn and grow.


 Don’t meet every requirement? If you are excited about this role and our mission, and have relevant, transferable skills, we encourage you to apply – even if you don’t check every box.
   

  

**WHY VOI?**
 Working At Voi Is More Than Just a Job; Our People Promise Includes a Personal Voyage Where You Will Grow As a Professional And Be a Part Of a Team And Culture That Builds Something Meaningful For Society. In Addition To This You’ll Have The Opportunity To
   

  

* Join Europe’s #1 micromobility operator and one of the fastest growing scale‑ups.
* Enjoy unlimited free Voi rides and a dog‑friendly office.
* Work together with inspiring, motivated and supportive colleagues towards a common goal.
* Join the micromobility revolution and be a part of creating sustainable cities made for living, free from noise and pollution.

title: CX & Content Designer
description:
We are looking for a CX & Content Designer to join our Nordic Knots team in Stockholm. We are searching for an experienced digital designer with strong UX/UI capability and a commercial mindset. You should be structured, detail-oriented and motivated by shaping clear, inspiring and high-performing digital shopping experiences.
 



  





**The Role** 




 As CX & Content Designer, you will take ownership of key parts of the Nordic Knots e-commerce experience, shaping how customers discover, understand and choose our products online.
 



 You will translate commercial priorities and customer insights into structured UX improvements and refined visual execution across category pages, product pages and navigation. Working closely with Growth, E-commerce, CX and Creative teams, you will play a central role in evolving our digital customer journeys and supporting measurable improvements in clarity, engagement and conversion.
 



 This role combines strategic responsibility with hands-on execution. You will lead defined UX and content initiatives while also driving high-quality implementation across ongoing site improvements as we scale.
 



 This role reports to the Chief Growth Officer.
 



  





**Your Responsibilities** 



* Own and evolve defined customer journey areas across the website
* Identify UX improvement opportunities based on data, customer behaviour and commercial priorities
* Design and iterate on UX/UI improvements across category pages, product pages, navigation and filtering experiences
* Create wireframes, prototypes and final design outputs for new features and optimisation initiatives
* Translate structured commercial briefs into clear design solutions with defined priorities and timelines
* Drive execution of website updates including merchandising modules, campaign pages and content layouts
* Collaborate closely with the E-commerce team on CRO initiatives and testing roadmap
* Ensure visual consistency and strong brand expression across all digital customer touchpoints
* Participate in weekly creative reviews and cross-functional project planning



  





**About You** 



* Minimum 5 years experience working with e-commerce or digital product design
* Strong portfolio demonstrating both strategic UX thinking and high-quality visual execution
* Advanced proficiency in Figma and Adobe Creative Suite, with the ability to move confidently from concept and wireframe to polished, production-ready design
* Comfortable working with data, testing frameworks and performance-driven design decisions
* Highly organised and confident managing multiple priorities in a fast-moving environment
* Detail-oriented with a strong sense of ownership and accountability
* Experience collaborating cross-functionally with Growth, Product or Commercial teams to deliver measurable UX improvements
* Experience working in premium consumer brands or design-led companies is a plus
* Interest in interior design, architecture or lifestyle brands is a plus



  





**Nordic Knots** 




 Nordic Knots was founded in 2016 by Liza Laserow, Fabian Berglund and Felix Berglund. We are a fast-growing direct-to-consumer Scandinavian interior design brand with the USA as the major market.
 



 Nordic Knots was born from a culture of thoughtful design that lasts beyond seasons and trends. Fusing function and aesthetics with a Scandinavian sensibility, we craft timeless textiles for the modern home. We believe that great textiles are foundational and can transform a house into a harmonious home — framing the most beautifully curated lives.
 



 The head office as well as the flagship store is located at Birger Jarlsgatan in central Stockholm. We have a constantly growing team in both Sweden and the USA.
 



  





**What We Offer** 




 We are a driven team with high ambitions and an entrepreneurial, open-minded culture where new ideas and initiatives are encouraged. At Nordic Knots, everyone plays a meaningful role in contributing to our continued growth.
 



 We value diversity and inclusion and welcome applicants who bring different perspectives, experiences and ideas to our team.
 



  





**Location** 




 This position is based at our Stockholm headquarters.
 



  





 To support your application, please include a portfolio showcasing selected examples of your most relevant work.

title: UX Artist
description:
As a UX artist at Embark, you will enable amazing user experiences for our gamers, experiences that they will remember and talk about for decades. Here you will work closely together with other talents to create everything from 2D elements, animations, menus, HUD, to living and inviting scenes with 3D components.
   

  

 If you like to spend time thinking about how players explore and experience games, and perhaps you also imagine a future where players can be part of creating their own unique experiences, then Embark might be your future home
   

  

**Example Of Responsibilities**
* Collaborate with a wide range of talents at Embark to deliver a great user experience
* Create aesthetically delightful visuals that enhances the gameplay experience
* Evaluating different software, techniques, engines and pipelines and help us get better and change how we work in the future


**We would love if you have**
* A creative and curious mind
* A strong passion for art, design and games
* Excellent visual skillset and deep artistic understanding and knowledge
* Experience of following directions and deliver to quality from a visual, game play and technical perspective
* Professional English communication skills


 At Embark we offer competitive salaries, passionate colleagues to share knowledge with and much more, but most of all we invite you to take part of a journey into the unknown, to build creative, surprising and beautiful experiences together.
   

  

 We welcome game makers of all sex, class, colour, age, gender identity, education, religion, opinion, culture, nation of origin, language, sexual orientation, shape, size, and ability.
   

  

 Did we leave anyone out? Well, we welcome you, too! We think that the gaming industry is made better when everyone has a seat at the table.
   

  

 Be yourself at Embark and make games while doing so. Please apply with confidence. We can’t wait to hear from you (in English)!

title: Product Director
description:
****About Magma Math****
 Magma is one of the world's fastest-growing and most celebrated EdTech companies, transforming math education through the power of AI. Our platform turns handwritten solutions into digital insights, empowering teachers to focus on creativity and deeper learning - while giving them real-time visibility into student progress.
   

  

 The result? More inclusive, engaging, and effective math classrooms for all learners.
   

  

 But we're not just building better tools. We're tackling one of the biggest challenges in global education: math
   

  

 underperformance. With 1 in 5 students globally struggling in math - a subject that forms the backbone of so many career paths - we believe the opportunity to improve outcomes at scale is massive.
   

  

 We're already the go-to solution in thousands of schools - and we're just getting started. As we expand rapidly across the U.S. and Europe, we're building a team as ambitious as our mission: to help millions of students unlock their full potential in math.
   

  

****The Role****
 The Product & Tech team at Magma is divided into three core experiences: Teacher, Student and District. With a growing user base and plenty of problems to solve, we're hiring a
 **Product Director of Student Experience** 
 to own the student-facing part of our product and take full ownership of the space.
   

  

 You will define the vision and strategy for the student experience, manage stakeholders across the organization, and align priorities across teams. You are ultimately responsible for making sure every feature we ship moves the needle for learners.
   

  

 At the same time, you will act as Product Manager for one of the product units - working side-by-side with developers, QA and designers to plan, build and launch features. You will own a domain end-to-end - from figuring out what problem is worth solving, to shipping a solution, to making sure it actually creates value.
   

  

**Who You Are And What You Know**
* Have experience leading and growing product teams; you know how to build structure and set meaningful KPIs
* Be hands-on across the full product development cycle; user research, design, implementation, testing. This is not a pure project manager role where you are only coordinating
* Have strong technical understanding, enough to engage with engineers
* Be structured and always questioning the status quo - you plan ahead and look for better ways to work
* Be curious and eager to learn - and a team player who understands others' perspectives


**Your Responsibilities Will Include**
* Owning the vision, strategy and roadmap for the Student Experience
* Leading a team of developers, QAs and designers as hands-on PM for one product unit, from discovery to implementation.
* Coordinating efforts across the product, tech, customer success and revenue teams
* Setting KPIs and long-term goal structures
* Mentoring and developing team members


**Requirements**
* Proven track record in product management, including leadership experience
* Experience leading people and teams
* Engineering degree (or equivalent) from top tier university
* Startup experience — you know what you are getting yourself into!
* Experience of fast paced and high performance environment


**Nice to have**
* Experience as software engineer, designer, product manager, data science
* Experience in edtech or education
* Portfolio of products you've built


**What We Offer**
* Build and ship high touch products with positive impact on millions of users
* Be part of driving change in an industry
* Fantastic colleagues in a fun environment with great opportunities to learn
* Competitive remuneration & benefit package
* Annual company trip
* An opportunity to work on a meaningful mission and have an exceptional impact on education, society and how children learn math across the world


 Start: As soon as possible
   

  

 Office location: Stora Nygatan 27, 11227 Stockholm, Sweden
   

  

**Our Recruitment Process (all In Office)**
* 1st interview with Hiring Manager and Head of People
* 2nd interview with Hiring Manager and Magma member
* 3rd interview with Founders and Magma member


 Note: We practice a 5 day in office policy, and we look forward to working together closely with you.

title: Product Manager - R&D
description:
This role is a part of the R&D team at Avalanche Studios Group. This department has a singular focus: finding the next big thing! We do this by building prototypes and quickly testing them with real players.
   

  

 As a Product Manager in the R&D team at Avalanche Studios Group, your role is to lead and evolve the Playtesting Program that allows us to quickly test early game prototypes with external players. This role is key to our efforts of testing game ideas with real players often and early. You will focus on scaling the program to the next level, ensuring we can validate concepts effectively very early in development.
   

  

**The Position**
 As the Product Manager, you will take holistic ownership of the Playtesting Program. Your primary focus will be to define and execute the program's overall strategy and expansion. This includes cultivating a thriving ecosystem of playtesters and ensuring robust testing capabilities. The goal is to assess product-market fit and inform decisions about a prototype's future development. Furthermore, you will actively build out our internal capabilities for evaluating and testing ideas sourced from external partners.
   

  

 You will report to the Product Director, R&D. This on-site role is based in our Stockholm office, with the opportunity to work up to two days a week from home.
   

  

**What You'll Do**
* Program Strategy & Expansion: Developing and refining the Playtesting Program strategy to scale effectively, including expanding its scope to incorporate external partners.
* Execution & Collaboration: Ensure the successful execution of playtests, working closely with User Research, the Community Manager, and development teams.
* Performance & Evaluation: Defining, tracking, and driving efforts to meet key success metrics related to playtester engagement and growth. Regularly evaluating the program to identify and implement improvements that support large-scale operation.


**Who You Are**
* Entrepreneurial and Proactive: Comfortable initiating and managing change with an entrepreneurial mindset.
* Proven Experience: Experienced in scaling products and/or services within the tech industry, preferably within gaming. This includes coaching internal support teams, as well as directing external agencies.
* Strong Communicator: Excellent written and verbal English communication skills, as well as strong presentation skills to confidently address stakeholders at all organizational levels.
* Organized and Collaborative: Demonstrates strong project management skills and thrives as a team player within a matrixed organization.
* Product Vision and Strategy: Proven ability to translate strategic business objectives into a clear product vision and roadmap, driving innovative and impactful gaming experiences.
* Passionate about Gaming: Has a genuine passion for and actively plays video games. Stays up to date with industry trends and demonstrates an understanding of what motivates players.


 Note: Research shows under-represented groups in the industry might not apply to a job if they don’t check off every requirement. At Avalanche, we’re more about your drive to learn and interest in tackling challenges than what’s on your resume! So don’t stress if you don’t tick every box— shoot us your application anyway! Diverse opinions and different experiences are what make our teams so great, not itemized lists of qualifications.
   

  

**The Stockholm location**
 Our Stockholm office is situated in Södermalm, the beating heart of the city’s game industry. It’s a physical representation of our games – the lush vegetation of Just Cause and theHunter: Call of the Wild meets corroded metal straight out of Mad Max. Our hybrid model requires you to be in the office on Mondays, Tuesdays, and Thursdays to foster collaboration and creativity.
   

  

**Our values**
 At Avalanche Studios Group, we create worlds beyond limits. But that’s not exclusive to our games, so we’re committed to developing a diverse and inclusive workplace. All Avalanchers have a shared responsibility to create an open work environment where everyone is treated equally and respectfully. Being part of our world is not contingent on your heritage, your gender, or sexual orientation. It’s all about your passion and creativity.
   

  

**How To Apply**
 To apply for this position, please register below and provide your CV in English. We review applications continuously. All further studio-related information is provided under a non-disclosure agreement.
   

  

 At Avalanche Studios Group we're always on the lookout for talented individuals to join our passionate team, but please note that relocation assistance is not available for this role.
   

  

 We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Senior Product Designer - ZEOS Design and Research (all genders)
description:
ZEOS is part of Zalando, leveraging the company’s infrastructure, technology, and expertise to build an operating system for fashion & lifestyle. Established in 2023, ZEOS is developing tools that allow brands and retailers to manage their multi-channel business in one place. We aim to enable seamless e-commerce across Europe from new market entry and expansion to optimization and business steering. The first ZEOS product is called ZEOS Fulfilment, and it gives brands and retailers the ability to fulfil their multi-channel sales using one stock pool, one carrier integration, and one user interface. Being a small unit within a big company enables us to act fast, but with the backup from one of the leading online platforms for fashion and lifestyle in Europe.
   

  

 Over the last years, we learned at Zalando that solving fulfilment related challenges for the good of our merchants helps us to fuel the growth of our platform.
   

  

 Strengthened by this successful growth, we have started the next step in our journey - expanding our business outside of the Zalando ecosystem, exploring both physical and digital services. Zalando launched the ZEOS brand last year (short for Zalando E-commerce Operating System), aiming to build an operating system for the fashion and lifestyle industry that enables brands and retailers to manage their multi-channel business across Europe within one unified platform.
   

  

 As a
 **Senior Product Designer** 
 in the ZEOS Design & Research team, you will be responsible for customer-facing digital experiences for our ZEOS Logistics service offerings. Your joint mission is to empower fashion and lifestyle brands to expand their business and increase their profitability across multiple marketplaces and countries throughout Europe through ZEOS.
   

  

 Using your excellent craft skills and seasoned experience, you will design 0 to 1 experiences that empower brands and retailers to steer their multi-channel logistics for their business from our ZEOS digital touchpoints. This is an important role that will help shape the vision for the user experiences for ZEOS, and requires strong foundational UX skills, exceptional stakeholder management, experience in workshop facilitation, and in crafting and evangelising design strategies and visions.
   

  

  

****INCLUSIVE BY DESIGN****
 At Zalando, our vision is to be the leading pan-European ecosystem for fashion and lifestyle e-commerce - one that is inclusive by design. We only assess candidates based on qualifications, merit, and business needs. We welcome applications from people of all gender identities, sexual orientations, personal expressions, racial identities, ethnicities, religious beliefs, and disability statuses. We only want to know why you’re great for this role, so please avoid including your picture, age, and marital status in your CV as well.
   

  

 We want to provide you with a great candidate experience. Please feel free to inform us of any accommodations you may need, so we can best support and assist you throughout the hiring process.
   

  

 do.BETTER - our diversity & inclusion strategy https //jobs.zalando.com/en/our-culture/diversity-and-inclusion
   

  

**WHAT WE’D LOVE YOU TO DO (AND LOVE DOING)**
* You would work with cross-functional teams (product managers, product researchers, fellow designers, & developers) to drive the design vision and strategy for our new multichannel offering that will deliver the best possible experience for both our merchants and their end customers.
* You’ll lead the design of complex customer journeys that cut across multiple pillars, services and teams.
* You’ll help lead stakeholders and team members towards innovative and engaging solutions by conducting design thinking workshops and design sprints that leverage user research.
* You’ll apply strategic thinking to visualise ideas and concepts and communicate them effectively and compellingly for internal stakeholders, partners and customers
* You’ll work to validate and refine concepts with internal and external stakeholders including actual merchants and end users
* You’ll lead by example by producing high-quality work no matter how big or small the task may be.
* You’ll foster design excellence by helping to set the bar for design quality through your own work, and will mentor fellow designers via rituals such as critiques and office hours.


**WE’D LOVE TO MEET YOU IF**
* Experience You are a seasoned design professional with B2B experience that has led the design for complex projects which have delivered valuable end-to-end experiences to your users. You aren’t afraid of ambiguity and you are inspired to dive deep and solve complex and meaningful problems that resonate with customers and their end users. You are adept at bringing various threads together into a unified design strategy that can be understood and executed on by product teams.
* Collaboration You work collaboratively with product managers, engineers, stakeholders and users to understand and define the key problems and desired experiences for solutions, owning the design thread from discovery through delivery.
* Curiosity You are curious about the industry in which you work and the needs of your customers, which allows you to creatively solve their problems.
* Craft You possess expert knowledge in the end-to-end product design process, demonstrating a command of product and design strategy, distillation of problem statements, user needs, journey mapping, wireframing, prototyping, user testing, and the creation of high fidelity visuals. You know how to bring everything together in the form of useful solutions and usable and delightful interactions for our users.
* Experimentation You have a generative approach, strive to solve problems in the best way possible through iteration, leveraging data and insights to drive future iterations and features.
* Delivery You scope and define deliverables and ensure developers have everything they need to build the designed solution. You ensure a remarkable quality of what goes live.
* Empathy You have the mindset and methodologies to understand your customers, colleagues and employees.
* Storytelling You bring not just users but also stakeholders and employees on a journey, enabling them to truly understand the end customer and vision and experience you are setting out to deliver, and the ‘why’ behind your design decisions.


****OUR OFFER****
 Zalando provides a range of benefits, here’s an overview of what you can expect. Ask your Talent Acquisition Partner to learn more about what we offer.
   

  

  

* Employee shares program
* 40% off fashion and beauty products sold and shipped by Zalando, 30% off Lounge by Zalando, discounts from external partners
* 2 paid volunteering days a year
* Hybrid working model with up to 60% remote per week, actual practice is up to each team to best support their collaboration
* Work from abroad for up to 30 working days a year
* 27 days of vacation a year to start for full-time employees
* Relocation assistance available (subject to prior agreement)
* Family services, including counseling and support
* Health and wellbeing options (including Wellhub, formerly Gympass)
* Mental health support and coaching available
* Drive your development through our training platform and biannual peer-to-peer review

title: Design System Specialist
description:
Above is looking for a Design System Specialist to help shape the next generation of complex digital products for global clients.
   

  

 This role sits at the intersection of visual craft, system thinking, and modern AI workflows.
   

  

**What You’ll Do At Above**
* Lead the creation of scalable, robust design systems for complex enterprise products.
* Use AI tools to generate and maintain documentation, usage guidelines, and developer specs.
* Work with AI-assisted handoff tools to ensure pixel-perfect alignment between Figma and production code, including automated checks for accessibility and brand consistency.
* Use generative scripts to map legacy patterns to new tokens and components, accelerating system adoption.


**What Makes You a Great Fit**
* 5+ years of experience building large-scale design systems.
* A strong portfolio showcasing real, complex design systems (AI-assisted work is a plus).
* Expert in Figma and curious about the new wave of AI design tools.
* Strong system thinking — you know how to structure tokens and data so machines and humans understand them.
* A sharp QA mindset: you use AI to explore, but trust your eye to curate and validate.
* Comfortable explaining complex ideas to designers, developers, and stakeholders.
* Mentor the team on how to use AI responsibly and creatively within design systems.


**What Above Offers**
* Exciting projects with global clients
* A warm, collaborative culture with personal coaching
* Central Stockholm office
* Competitive compensation
* Access to the Eidra network of experts


**About Above**
 Above is a design agency built on curiosity, collaboration, and craft.
   

  

 We help brands grow by creating meaningful, effective experiences that change behavior for the better.
   

  

 You’ll join a multidisciplinary team where feedback is part of everyday work, creativity is taken seriously, and people genuinely care about doing great work together. We believe in trust, flexibility, and giving designers space to grow — creatively and professionally.
   

  

**Practical details**
* Please include CV + portfolio (projects showing how you work matter most — and AI-assisted work is a plus)
* Location: Stockholm
* Open to relocating? Let us know — we’d love to hear from you!

title: Product Director

Our platform turns handwritten solutions into digital insights, empowering teachers to focus on creativity and deeper learning - while giving them real-time visibility into student progress.

* Be structured and always questioning the status quo - you plan ahead and look for better ways to work
