* Demonstrates in-depth knowledge within the company in one or more solution domains as well as the customer's technical and business environment.
* Orchestrates the design of complex proposals to deliver and communicate tangible business value to customers.
* Critical review proposal, applies market intelligence and thought leadership to translate the functional view into a technical view, enhancing proposed workload-optimized solutions.
* Provides input to all global business units to address key end-customer IT trends, requirements, gaps, or unmet needs.
* Communicates HPE’s end solution value propositions in the language of the customer and demonstrates how the proposition aligns to business outcomes and customer needs.
* Develops and maintains adjacent technology knowledge, along with in-depth knowledge of current and emerging technologies and trends.
* Drives the Account Business Planning process, leverage knowledge of industry trends and the customer’s technical environment.
* Facilitates and leads deep-dive discussions with the client and accounts teams to build customer relationships, understand business needs, evaluate the customer's ecosystem and advocate and present technical strategies for a customer's transformation.
* Proactively builds the pipeline by identifying opportunities (e.g., enhancements, unmet or unrecognized needs, up-selling, and cross-selling opportunities) within the account.
* Documents ongoing work (activities, tasks) throughout the sales cycle using specific tools and resources and sharing best practices with peers and partners to collaborate more effectively.
* Engages with and builds consultative presence and advisory influence with VPs, CxO, and line-of-business (LOB) management and customer thought leaders.
* Anticipates customer needs and proactively engages partners and resources to design innovative solutions and generate customer demand.
* Proactively shares knowledge with peers and actively helps develop knowledge and expertise within the Presales community.


**Education And Experience**
* Advanced degree in technology or related field preferred, or equivalent technical qualifications
* 8+ years of technical experience in IT with a focus on technical consulting and solution selling;
* 2+ Industry standard relevant technology certifications or equivalent experience expected.
* Enterprise architecture frameworks and project management methodologies and certifications are helpful, but not required.
* Fluency in Swedish language and in English


**Knowledge And Skills**
* Advanced experience leading solution configurations and overall architecture design and creating, managing, and positioning demos and proofs-of-concept (POC) to meet customer requirements.
* Advanced understanding of the company portfolio of products, software, services, solution domain specialization, and adjacent solution domain(s), showing how they can be combined to address customer needs, and how the workload solution can be adapted for strategic customer and industry solutions.
* Expertise and deep working knowledge with the as-a-service (aaS) business model, business value, and complete ecosystem and how that drives aaS strategic goals within one or more domains.
* Mastery of written, verbal and nonverbal communication skills, including active listening and storytelling, with ability to communicate in English and applicable local languages as need to perform job requirements.
* Demonstrates advanced discussion and persuasion skills used to support company point-of-view, while respectfully questioning and challenging proposed solutions.
* Unique mastery of consultative and value selling skills, advisory influence, and executive gravitas, including presenting, white boarding, storytelling, objection-handling, and closing skills.
* Ability to design and develop a playbook for demonstrations or walk throughs of products, solutions, tools, or service.
* Ability to deliver live demonstrations or walk throughs of products, solutions, tools, or service to customers, partners, and other stakeholders.
* Understanding of company’s preferred go-to-market strategy, global context, coverage options relative to partners and has expert knowledge of partner offerings, along with how/when to leverage them for deals within area of specialization.


**Additional Skills**
 Accountability, Accountability, Active Learning, Active Listening, Assertiveness, Bias, Building Rapport, Buyer Personas, Coaching, Complex Sales, Creativity, Critical Thinking, Cross-Functional Teamwork, Customer Experience Strategy, Customer Interactions, Design Thinking, Empathy, Financial Acumen, Follow-Through, Growth Mindset, Identifying Sales Opportunities, Industry Knowledge, Intellectual Curiosity (Inactive), Long Term Planning, Managing Ambiguity {+ 6 more}
   

  

**What We Can Offer You**
**Health & Wellbeing**
 We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.
   

  

**Personal & Professional Development**
 We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.
   

  

**Unconditional Inclusion**
 We are unconditionally inclusive in the way we work and celebrate individual uniqueness. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good.
   

  

**Let's Stay Connected**
 Follow @HPECareers on Instagram to see the latest on people, culture and tech at HPE.
   

  

 #sweden
   

  

 #sales
   

  

**Job**
 Sales
   

  

**Job Level**
 TCP\_05
   

  

 HPE is an Equal Employment Opportunity/ Veterans/Disabled/LGBT employer. We do not discriminate on the basis of race, gender, or any other protected category, and all decisions we make are made on the basis of qualifications, merit, and business need. Our goal is to be one global team that is representative of our customers, in an inclusive environment where we can continue to innovate and grow together. Please click here: Equal Employment Opportunity.
   

  

**Hewlett Packard Enterprise is EEO Protected Veteran/ Individual with Disabilities.**
 HPE will comply with all applicable laws related to employer use of arrest and conviction records, including laws requiring employers to consider for employment qualified applicants with criminal histories.
   

  

**No Fees Notice & Recruitment Fraud Disclaimer**
*It has come to HPE’s attention that there has been an increase in recruitment fraud whereby scammer impersonate HPE or HPE-authorized recruiting agencies and offer fake employment opportunities to candidates. These scammers often seek to obtain personal information or money from candidates.*
*Please note that Hewlett Packard Enterprise (HPE), its direct and indirect subsidiaries and affiliated companies, and its authorized recruitment agencies/vendors
 **will never charge any candidate a registration fee, hiring fee, or any other fee in connection with its recruitment and hiring process.** 
 The credentials of any hiring agency that claims to be working with HPE for recruitment of talent should be verified by candidates and candidates shall be solely responsible to conduct such verification. Any candidate/individual who relies on the erroneous representations made by fraudulent employment agencies does so at their own risk, and HPE disclaims liability for any damages or claims that may result from any such communication.*

title: Junior Order Administrator (Summer Job)
description:
TD SYNNEX, är den ledande IT-distributören både globalt och även på den svenska marknaden med nordiskt huvudkontor, norr om Stockholm samt lokalkontor i Danmark, Norge och Finland. Med unik kompetens, hög tillgänglighet, effektiv logistik och efterfrågade kringtjänster hjälper vi dagligen våra återförsäljare att på ett kostnadseffektivt sätt sälja och marknadsföra IT-produkter och lösningar.
   

  

 Läs gärna mer på https://se.tdsynnex.com/
   

  

**Om tjänsten**
**Detta är en tidsbegränsad anställning på ca 3-5 månader, april/maj till augusti/september.** 
**Vi söker en sommarjobbare till vår projektorderhantering.**
 Som 'Sales Order Executive (Orderadministratör) hos oss kommer du att hantera inkommande orderflöden på företaget för ett mycket viktigt projekt där arbetsbelastningen är hög under vår och sommar. Rollen innefattas av att du kommer samarbeta med dina kollegor och säkerställa att produkter finns tillgängliga i tid för produktion och leverans. Du kommer vara en viktig länk mellan flera av våra interna avdelningar och samtidigt säkerställa servicenivåer mot kunder och löpande besvara de förfrågningar de har.
   

  

**Några Av Arbetsuppgifterna**
* Registrering av order, komplettera och ändra order samt övervaka orderflödet.
* Arbeta med CRM-system, ärendehanteringssystem, mailboxar.
* Bevaka leveranstider för kunds räkning och hantera eventuell restorder.
* Samarbeta med andra avdelningar inom TD SYNNEX.
* Säkerställa god servicenivå till våra kunder och kollegor internt.


**Om dig**
 För att bli framgångsrik i rollen som Sales Order Executive tror vi att du är en driven person, strukturerad, lösningsorienterad och stresstålig. Du behöver tycka om administration, vara noggrann och ha en stark känsla för service samt klara av att arbeta med repetitiva arbetsuppgifter.
   

  

 En förutsättning för att lyckas bra i rollen är att du har god datorvana. Det är meriterande om du har arbetat i affärssystem tidigare samt har erfarenhet av SAP, men är ej ett krav. Även goda kunskaper av Excel och Officepaketet är meriterande. Du ska känna dig bekväm med att kommunicera obehindrat på svenska i tal och skrift samt skriftligen på engelska.
   

  

**Vi kan erbjuda dig** 
 med rätt kvalifikationer och inställning, ett arbete i ett internationellt marknadsledande företag där ingen dag är den andra lik. Låter det spännande med ett företag som präglas av högt tempo och verkar på en utmanande marknad? Då kanske TD SYNNEX skulle vara en attraktiv arbetsplats för dig. För rätt person finns det även goda möjligheter att utvecklas inom TD SYNNEX!
   

  

**Vi Erbjuder Även**
* Flexibelt distansarbete, 2-3 dagar per vecka
* Snyggt, modernt och fräscht kontor nära Westfield/Mall of Scandinavia


**Key Skills**
 At TD SYNNEX, our values guide everything we do: Together, We Own It, We Dare to Go, We Grow and Win, and above all, We Do the Right Thing. These principles shape how we work with each other, our partners, and our communities as we drive innovation and create lasting impact.
   

  

**What's In It For You?**
* Elective Benefits: Our programs are tailored to your country to best accommodate your lifestyle.
* Grow Your Career: Accelerate your path to success (and keep up with the future) with formal programs on leadership and professional development, and many more on-demand courses.
* Elevate Your Personal Well-Being: Boost your financial, physical, and mental well-being through seminars, events, and our global Life Empowerment Assistance Program.
* Diversity, Equity & Inclusion: It's not just a phrase to us; valuing every voice is how we succeed. Join us in celebrating our global diversity through inclusive education, meaningful peer-to-peer conversations, and equitable growth and development opportunities.
* Make the Most of our Global Organization: Network with other new co-workers within your first 30 days through our onboarding program.
* Connect with Your Community: Participate in internal, peer-led inclusive communities and activities, including business resource groups, local volunteering events, and more environmental and social initiatives.


**Don't meet every single requirement? Apply anyway.**
 At TD SYNNEX, we're proud to be recognized as a great place to work and a leader in the promotion and practice of diversity, equity and inclusion. If you're excited about working for our company and believe you're a good fit for this role, we encourage you to apply. You may be exactly the person we're looking for!

title: Producer, H&M Studios (Temporary 6 month contract)
description:
**Job Description**

  

  





**WHAT YOU’LL DO** 
**​** 





 As a Producer at H&M Studios, you will lead teams and drive photo and film productions from start to finish. This includes planning, budgeting, on set production and post-production.
   

  





 Key responsibilities:
   

  




* Leading end to end productions and projects, delivering on brief.
* Budget responsibility, managing stakeholders and timeline.
* Source, manage and negotiate external partners and suppliers involved in the production.
* Executive producing on set.



**WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH** 
**​** 
  

  





 You will work at H&M Studios creating fashion content for H&M’s full assortment globally, such as model images, product images and video assets. Our mission is to elevate the full assortment, enabling H&M to become a credible fashion brand. In addition to our internal teams, you will get the chance to work with international top talents and creatives.
   

  





 Qualifications
   

  





**WHO YOU ARE** 
 ​
   

  





 We are looking for people with…​
   

  




* 5+ years of experience working with still and moving production.
* Extensive experience from working with on-set production as well as post-production, preferably from the fashion industry.
* Experience from working in a fast-paced environment with several productions and projects ongoing and thrive when doing so.



 And people who are…​
   

  




* Solution oriented and dare to make decisions to drive the team forward and ensure that the purpose of the production and projects are achieved.
* Demonstrated collaboration skills to work effectively with diverse stakeholders.
* Positive service-minded, and great administration skills.
* Excellent organizational skills and attention to detail.


**Additional Information**

**This is a full-time temporary (6 month) position based in Stockholm.** 
 Apply by submitting your CV in English as soon as possible. Due to data policies, we only accept applications through our career page.
   

  





**WHO WE ARE**
  

  

  

 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.
   

  





 We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future.
   

  





  

  

**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE**
  

  

  

 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer our employees attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe.
   

  




* 25% Staff discount on all our H&M Group brands, both in stores and online (H&M, COS, Weekday, Monki, H&M HOME, & Other Stories and ARKET).
* H&M Incentive Program - HIP. Learn more about the program here.
* In addition to our global benefits, our local markets offer different competitive perks and benefits. (Example: Competitive compensation for your dedication and long-term commitment).



**JOIN US**




 Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things - our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.
   

  





***We are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you to not attach a cover letter in your application.***

title: Senior Business Controller
description:
Sinch is pioneering the way the world communicates. More than 175,000 businesses - including Google, Uber, Paypal, Visa, Tinder, and many others - rely on Sinch's Customer Communications Cloud to power engaging customer experiences through mobile messaging, voice, and email.
 







 Whether you need to verify users or craft omnichannel campaigns, Sinch makes it easy. Our AI-infused Super Network, APIs, and applications ensure you can connect with your customers reliably and securely, at every step of their journey.
 







 At Sinch we "Dream Big", "Win Together", "Keep it simple", and "Make it Happen". These values are our foundation!
 







**About the role** 




 As a Senior Business Controller in the OPEX FP&A team, you will act as a strategic finance partner to the CTO of Sinch and senior leaders within the CTO organization. You will support and challenge the business to set and achieve financial targets, drive cost efficiency, and enable data-driven decision making. You will play a key role in reporting, forecasting, budgeting, and long-term financial steering, while proactively identifying opportunities for optimization and improvement.
 







 You will be the primary finance partner to our CTO, collaborating with fellow finance partners in an international OPEX FP&A team across Sweden and the US to deliver best-in-class stakeholder support. Together with other Business Controllers and cross-functional teams across Sinch, you will drive efficient ways of working while continuously improving data quality, processes, and business insights.
 







**Key responsibilities:** 



* Act as the finance partner to our CTO, and a trusted finance partner to senior stakeholders within the Tech organization by enabling data driven decision making.
* Support, discuss and challenge financial performance with budget owners and managers.
* Drive financial steering through reporting, analysis, storytelling, budgeting, forecasting, etc.
* Provide insights and recommendations for strategic decisions, including ROI analysis, business plan reviews, and cost optimization initiatives.
* Contribute to continuous improvement of FP&A processes, tools, and data quality.







 The role is based at SINCH HQ in Stockholm, Sweden and reports to SINCH Manager, OPEX, FP&A.
 







**About you** 




 To be successful in this role you need to be technical, analytical, with a passion for numbers and be able to see and communicate the bigger picture. You are driven, ambitious and take own initiatives, as well as a good communicator who can influence different stakeholder groups, adapting the content & language to the audience. You are hands on, result oriented, and most importantly, you are a senior business partner always looking out for the interest of the business.
 






* Significant experience (7+ years) in Business Control, FP&A, Management Consulting, or similar roles in a large, international organization
* Experience from working with cost allocations and allocation models
* Proven track record of driving process improvement and automation
* MSc or equivalent degree with a strong academic record
* Fluent in English, written and spoken







**Big plus!** 



* Hands-on experience using AI tools to drive efficiency and process improvement
* Experience from Telco, Messaging or OTT industries
* Experience from high-growth or fast-scaling environments
* Fluent in Swedish
* Experience from working with such systems as Aaro, Tableau or similar.
* Experience from Cloud governance & reporting







**Practical information** 



* Our corporate language is English; please submit your application in English
* Relocation support is not provided







 Applicants must:
 


* Hold Swedish or EU/EEA citizenship
* Have a valid Swedish work permit







**Our hiring process** 




 We are committed to ensuring a recruitment process that is fair, objective, consistent, and inclusive. Our approach includes structured, competency-based interviews designed to evaluate your skills, experience, and qualifications relevant to the role. At times, we may include a data-driven assessment to enhance our hiring success and identify candidates likely to excel.
 







 We believe in a two-way process and encourage you to ask questions throughout the journey. If this role isn't what you're looking for, please explore the other opportunities listed on our career page: https://www.sinch.com/careers/. No matter who you are, we hope you find an exciting path forward - hopefully with us!

title: Senior Partner Sales Manager - Global System Integrator (GSI)
description:
Canonical is a leading provider of open source software and operating systems to the global enterprise and technology markets. Our platform, Ubuntu, is very widely used in breakthrough enterprise initiatives such as public cloud, data science, AI, engineering innovation, and IoT. Our customers include the world's leading public cloud and silicon providers, and industry leaders in many sectors. The company is a pioneer of global distributed collaboration, with 1200+ colleagues in 75+ countries and very few office-based roles. Teams meet two to four times yearly in person, in interesting locations around the world, to align on strategy and execution.
   

  

 The company is founder-led, profitable, and growing.
   

  

 Global System Integrators (GSI) play a crucial role in Canonical growth plans in the coming 3 years. We are hiring a
 **Senior** 
**Partner Sales Manager** 
 to work closely with Canonical GSI partners throughout their sales cycles and across their sales organizations to facilitate Ubuntu based solutions and opportunities, as well as help GSI build long term digital transformation platforms with Ubuntu stacks and services.
   

  

 Working the the Partner Sales Director in their geographic region, the Senior Partner Sales Manager will be responsible for building trusted relationships with partners, increasing Canonical market share and attach rate, evangelizing about the partnership and leading all business interactions from engineers to CxO level. They will often run customer workshops focused on particular initiatives at that customer, attend sales events, give public presentations and participate in executive engagements as coordinated by the Senior Director.
   

  

**The role entails**
* Build strategic relationships with partners at levels, and stickiness with Ubuntu technology
* Deep understanding of Linux and cloud software ecosystem, and open source selling models
* Negotiate contracts and commercial business terms
* Deep understanding of partner organizations and sales models, in particular with Global System Integrators
* Work closely with marketing, sales engineering and product management to deliver on targets, objectives and provide a voice of the partner
* Lead executive interlocks between partners and Canonical leadership team
* Ability to travel - sometimes internationally - up to 40% of the time


**What we are looking for in you**
* Extensive experience in alliance or indirect sales management roles
* Extensive experience with OpenStack, virtualization, containers and other Cloud technologies.
* Autonomous, disciplined, hands-on, get-it-done mentality
* Ability to capture customer requirements, evaluate gaps, identify and create opportunities
* Passionate about Ubuntu products and mission
* Comfortable in fast-paced and high pressure environments with ambitious achievement goals
* Excellent communication and presentation skills


**What we offer colleagues**
 We consider geographical location, experience, and performance in shaping compensation worldwide. We revisit compensation annually (and more often for graduates and associates) to ensure we recognize outstanding performance. In addition to base pay, we offer a performance-driven annual bonus or commission. We provide all team members with additional benefits which reflect our values and ideals. We balance our programs to meet local needs and ensure fairness globally.
   

  

* Distributed work environment with twice-yearly team sprints in person
* Personal learning and development budget of USD 2,000 per year
* Annual compensation review
* Recognition rewards
* Annual holiday leave
* Maternity and paternity leave
* Team Member Assistance Program & Wellness Platform
* Opportunity to travel to new locations to meet colleagues
* Priority Pass and travel upgrades for long-haul company events


**About Canonical**
 Canonical is a pioneering tech firm at the forefront of the global move to open source. As the company that publishes Ubuntu, one of the most important open-source projects and the platform for AI, IoT, and the cloud, we are changing the world of software. We recruit on a global basis and set a very high standard for people joining the company. We expect excellence; in order to succeed, we need to be the best at what we do. Most colleagues at Canonical have worked from home since our inception in 2004. Working here is a step into the future and will challenge you to think differently, work smarter, learn new skills, and raise your game.
   

  

**Canonical is an equal opportunity employer**
 We are proud to foster a workplace free from discrimination. Diversity of experience, perspectives, and background create a better work environment and better products. Whatever your identity, we will give your application fair consideration.

title: Business Development Executive (Ireland)
description:
EXCLUSIVE NETWORKS | Introduktion
   

  

 Exclusive Networks är en global specialist inom go‑to‑market för cybersäkerhet.
   

  

 Vi hjälper partners och slutkunder att lyckas genom ett brett utbud av tjänster och ledande produktportföljer. Med närvaro i över 45 länder och kapacitet att leverera till kunder i mer än 170 länder, kombinerar vi djup lokal expertis med styrkan, skalan och leveransförmågan hos en samlad global organisation.
   

  

 Vår förstklassiga leverantörsportfölj är noggrant utvald och omfattar samtliga ledande aktörer inom branschen.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder ett brett spektrum av tjänster - från hanterad säkerhet och specialistkompetens till teknisk certifiering och utbildning - anpassade för snabbt växande teknologier och föränderliga affärsmodeller. För mer information, besök www.exclusive-networks.com.
   

  

 På Exclusive Networks brinner vi för att göra skillnad. Det innebär att leverera det bästa och forma en välmående och pålitlig digital värld och hjälpa våra medarbetare att nå sin fulla potential.
   

  

 ARBETSUPPGIFTER OCH ANSVAR | Om rollen
   

  

 Denna roll är baserad i Dublin, Irland. Vi överväger gärna sökande som vill flytta till Dublin från Sverige, som talar engelska och är flytande i svenska.
   

  

 Som Channel Development Executive kommer du att befinna dig i framkant när det gäller att driva ny intäktstillväxt inom ett av de snabbast växande segmenten på cybersäkerhetsmarknaden i Nordeuropa.
   

  

 Detta är en dynamisk och resultatorienterad roll för dig som trivs i en prestationsdriven miljö, motiveras av att öppna nya affärsmöjligheter och inspireras av potentialen att kraftigt öka din ersättning genom starka resultat. Du tycker om att äga hela säljcykeln, bygga relationer med beslutsfattare och konsekvent omvandla dialoger till konkreta affärer.
   

  

 I rollen kommer du att spela en nyckelroll i att stärka och expandera vår marknadsnärvaro, i nära samarbete med SMB Sales Director för Nordeuropa. Du får stor exponering, hög grad av självständighet och det stöd som krävs för att ta nästa steg i din säljkarriär.
   

  

 Ditt engagemang, ditt genomförande och dina resultat kommer att vara avgörande för din framgång - och för din intjäningspotential.
   

  

 Huvudsakliga ansvarsområden
   

  

* Driva proaktiv och energisk outbound-telefonförsäljning för att identifiera nya partnerrelationer och återaktivera vilande konton.
* Leda självsäkra outreach-kampanjer för att identifiera högvärdiga nya affärsmöjligheter.
* Upprätthålla en konsekvent och strategisk uppföljning som håller affärer aktiva och driver dem genom säljprocessen.
* Bygga och hantera en stark pipeline motsvarande 3-4 gånger målet för att möjliggöra överprestation.
* Påskynda kundanskaffning och fördjupa samarbetet med ledande cybersäkerhetsleverantörer.
* Maximera lönsamheten genom att utnyttja rabatter, affärsregistreringar och leverantörsincitament på ett kommersiellt effektivt sätt.
* Bygga starka och förtroendefulla relationer med ägarledda VAR:er och MSP:er och bli deras främsta rådgivare för tillväxt.
* Driva korsförsäljning och merförsäljning av högvärdiga cybersäkerhetslösningar.
* Positionera företaget som en strategisk och långsiktig tillväxtpartner i varje dialog.
* Säkerställa en stabil och förutsägbar pipeline genom noggrann kvalificering och prognostisering.
* Använda CRM-verktyg för att följa partnerengagemang, övervaka affärsmöjligheter och upprätthålla god pipeline-hygien.
* Konsekvent nå och överträffa mål för intäkter, marginal och tillväxt genom hög aktivitetsnivå och stark säljexekvering.


 KVALIFIKATIONER OCH ERFARENHET | Om dig
   

  

**Den Ideala Kandidaten**
* Har minst 3 års dokumenterad erfarenhet av B2B-försäljning, gärna som Channel Development Executive eller Business Development Manager.
* Erfarenhet av channel development inom cybersäkerhet, IT-distribution eller partnerförsäljning är meriterande.
* Har arbetat med VAR:er, MSP:er och MSSP:er inom partner-ekosystem.
* Uppvisar en tydlig "hunter"-mentalitet med stark meritlista inom nykunds- och partneranskaffning.
* Har en självsäker telefonnärvaro och förmåga att leda effektiva kalla samtal.
* Har erfarenhet av att hantera prispress samtidigt som marginal och affärsintegritet skyddas.
* Har god affärsförståelse och kunskap om marginaler, rabatter, affärsregistrering och leverantörsprogram.
* Vi söker kandidater som talar svenska och engelska, samt även de som behärskar finska, norska, flamländska eller danska.


 VILKA ÄR EXCLUSIVE NETWORKS? | Varför arbeta hos oss
   

  

 Vi tror på människor som drivkraft för innovation och tillväxt.
   

  

 Vårt mål är att leda utvecklingen mot en säker, tillförlitlig och hållbar digital värld för både organisationer och samhället i stort.
   

  

 Vi är stolta över att vara en arbetsgivare som värdesätter mångfald och lika möjligheter.
   

  

 Vi strävar efter att attrahera och rekrytera människor med olika bakgrunder, perspektiv och erfarenheter, eftersom det stärker vår innovationsförmåga, förbättrar våra beslut och gör oss bättre rustade att möta våra kunders behov. Alla anställningsbeslut fattas utifrån kompetens, meriter och affärsbehov. Vi tolererar ingen form av diskriminering och behandlar alla med respekt och likvärdighet
   

  

 Vi värnar om din data: vänligen läs vår policy för dataskydd vid rekrytering innan du ansöker och delar dina uppgifter med oss.
   

  

**Desired Skills And Experience**
 Sales Business Development Telesales

title: Sales Advisor 25h & 8h - Summer Substitute
description:
**Job Description**

**WHAT YOU’LL DO** 
**​**
  

 As a Sales Advisor at H&M, you’ll play a key role in creating an outstanding customer experience. You’ll welcome customers, guide them through your store, and support them in finding what they need while showcasing our products. Acting in line with our values, you’ll contribute to both your own success and the success of the company.
   

  





 You will:
   

  




* Share your fashion and product knowledge to help customers make informed choices.
* Collaborate with your team to deliver exceptional service at every step of the customer journey.
* Ensure the sales floor and back of house are well-stocked, organized, and inviting.
* Support with opening and closing of the store.
* Represent yourself and the brand positively during all customer interactions.



**WHO YOU’LL WORK WITH** 
**​**




 Our stores are the heart of our company, where customers experience our brand firsthand. As part of the dynamic Store Team, every role—from Sales Advisors, Department Managers, Store Managers and Visual Merchandisers to Assistant Store Managers, Cash Office Responsible, and Delivery Responsible in larger stores—contributes to creating an inspiring and welcoming environment. You’ll also connect with the wider Area Team, collaborating across stores to share insights and drive success together. Alongside your team, you'll play a vital role in helping customers feel confident and express their individuality with the latest trends and timeless styles. By building meaningful connections with customers in our stores, we make fashion accessible and sustainable for all.
   

  





**WHO YOU ARE** 
**​**




*We are looking for people with…* 
 ​
   

  




* Experience in customer service within fashion, retail, or similar fields.



*And people who are…* 
 ​
   

  




* Passionate about fashion and delivering an exceptional in-store experience while promoting our products and driving sales.
* Thriving in collaborative and dynamic environments.
* Communicative, creative, curious to work with store technology, with a strong eagerness to learn and develop.
* Flexible and action oriented.



**WHO WE ARE** 
**​**




 H&M Group is a global company of strong fashion brands and ventures. Our goal is to prove that there is no compromise between exceptional design, affordable prices, and sustainable solutions. We want to liberate fashion for the many, and our customers are at the heart of every decision we make.​
   

  





 ​We are made up of thousands of passionate and talented colleagues united by our shared culture and values. Together, we want to use our power, our scale, and our knowledge to push the fashion industry towards a more inclusive and sustainable future. ​
   

  





**WHY YOU’LL LOVE WORKING HERE** 
**​**
  

 At H&M Group, we are proud to be a vibrant and welcoming company. We offer our employees attractive benefits with extensive development opportunities around the globe. ​
   

  




* All our employees receive a staff discount card, usable on all our H&M Group brands in stores and online.
* In addition to our staff discount, all our employees are included in our H&M Incentive Program – HIP. You can read more about our H&M Incentive Program here.



**JOIN US** 
**​**




 Our uniqueness comes from a combination of many things – our inclusive and collaborative culture, our strong values, and opportunities for growth. But most of all, it’s our people who make us who we are.​
   

  





 This is a temporary summer position offering a
 **25‑hour per week contract or a 8-hour contract** 
 starting in April or by agreement. This position is based in
 **Huddinge** 
 and you should be able to work during store opening hours. Language skills in Swedish or English is needed.
   

  





 We have an ongoing selection, so the position may be filled before the application deadline, so send in your application today!
 **The last application date is 3/4.**




 Take the next step in your career together with us. The journey starts here.​
   

  





*\** 
*Store roles assessment:*




*To manage the high volume of applications for the Sales Advisor role, we use an online assessment method for skills-based recruitment within some of our stores. You will need to complete it as part of the application and screening process. Your responses will be scored by an assessment tool that applies predefined criteria set by H&M Group.*




*After completing the assessment, you’ll have the opportunity to share feedback and ask questions. If you experience any difficulties or prefer an alternative assessment method, please contact* 
*recruitment\_support@hm.com* 
*. Choosing an alternative will not impact on your application.*




*For more information on how we process your personal data, please see our Privacy Notice.*




*\*\** 
*W* 
*e are committed to a recruitment process that is fair, equitable, and based on competency. We therefore kindly ask you to not attach a cover letter in your application.*

title: Sektionschef för incidentkoordinering vid CERT-SE
company: Swedish Civil Defence and Resilience Agency
description:
Myndigheten för civilt försvar
   

  

*Myndigheten för civilt försvar är den ledande, inriktande och samordnande myndigheten i det civila försvaret. Vi säkerställer att samhället är förberett för kris, höjd beredskap och krig.*
 Vill du ta en ledande roll i att skydda Sveriges digitala framtid?
   

  

 CERT-SE, Sveriges nationella CSIRT, söker en sektionschef för att leda och utveckla vår sektion för incidentkoordinering – en nyckelroll i att skydda våra samhällskritiska funktioner mot cyberangrepp.
   

  

 Ledarskapet hos oss utgår från tillit, medmänsklighet och viljan att arbeta tillsammans. Vi utgår från att vi gör vårt bästa och vill varandra väl. Att agera i linje med det innebär att medverka till ökad trygghet och ett hållbart arbetsliv.
   

  

**Ditt ansvar och dina arbetsuppgifter**
 Som chef ansvarar du för sektionens leverans, personal och ekonomi. Din huvuduppgift är att leda de medarbetare som finns på sektionen, dessa är experter inom sitt område och du arbetar för att skapa de förutsättningar som krävs för att medarbetarna ska kunna utföra sina uppgifter med bästa resultat. Ditt ansvar innebär både dagligt operativt arbete och långsiktigt utvecklingsarbete. Du kommer att ingå i enhetens ledningsgrupp.
   

  

**Du Kommer Även Ansvara För Att**
* rekrytera, leda och utveckla sektionens medarbetare, driva engagemang och främja en innovativ och trygg arbetsmiljö.
* strategiskt bygga upp och vidareutveckla sektionen för att möta framtida krav inom cybersäkerhet med fokus på incidenthantering och incidentkoordinering.
* säkerställa effektiva arbetsflöden samt att vi har de verktyg och processer som behövs.
* stärka organisationens förmåga att hantera cybersäkerhetshot och it-säkerhetsincidenter i linje med NIS2-direktivet.
* samverka med andra sektioner samt externa aktörer för att förbättra verksamheters eller målgruppers övergripande cybersäkerhet.
* driva förändringsarbete och leda sektionen genom en period av tillväxt och organisatorisk utveckling.


**Dina kunskaper och kompetenser**
 Vi söker dig som har flera års erfarenhet av ledarskap inom cybersäkerhetsområdet eller relevant bransch, gärna inom incidenthantering eller operativ ledning. Vidare har du erfarenhet av att leda verksamheter i förändring, med starkt fokus på utveckling och uppbyggnad av team. Du besitter förmåga att leda strategiskt samtidigt som du har en operativ överblick. Du har även en stark kommunikativ förmåga och erfarenhet av att samarbeta med både interna och externa intressenter. Din vana att samverka med andra myndigheter inom cybersäkerhetsområdet kommer väl till pass här, liksom din vana att hantera underrättelseinformation.
   

  

**Det Är Meriterande Om Du Har**
* erfarenhet från offentlig verksamhet eller samhällskritiska infrastruktursektorer.
* kunskap om regelverk och standarder inom området, inklusive NIS2-direktivet och annan relevant cybersäkerhetslagstiftning.


 I allt vårt arbete, både internt och externt, ska vi agera utifrån den statliga värdegrunden. Som alla medarbetare och ledare hos oss förväntas du agera utifrån myndighetens förhållningssätt.
   

  

 Förhållningssätten gäller i vardag, kris och krig. De ska ses som en helhet och bygger på varandra; samarbetsinriktad – proaktiv - handlingskraftig.
   

  

 Läs mer om våra förhållningssätt
   

  

 Vi lägger stor vikt vid dina personliga egenskaper. För att lyckas med dina åtaganden ser vi att du är lösningsorienterad och handlingskraftig i att hantera säkerhetsutmaningar. Då bör även ha en stark förmåga att prioritera och fatta beslut under press. Du har en god förmåga att skapa goda relationer och är kontakts- och förtroendebyggande.
   

  

**Om anställningen**
 Vi erbjuder dig en anställning tillsvidare på heltid som inleds med en provanställning med ett tidsbegränsat chefsförordnande på fyra år. Din placeringsort kommer att vara Stockholm och resor i anställningen förekommer.
   

  

 Majoriteten av våra anställningar innebär placering i säkerhetsklass. Vanligtvis krävs svenskt medborgarskap. Vid placering i säkerhetsklass kommer säkerhetsprövning med registerkontroll att genomföras före anställning enligt 3 kap i säkerhetsskyddslagen. De flesta medarbetare på Myndigheten för civilt försvar är krigsplacerade.
   

  

**Om oss**
 Anställningen är placerad på Enheten för operativ cybersäkerhet som även utgör CERT-SE.CERT-SE är Sveriges nationella CSIRT (Computer Security Incident Response Team) med uppgift att stödja det svenska samhället i arbetet med att hantera och förebygga it-säkerhetsincidenter och cyberangrepp. Vi är en central del av Sveriges skydd mot cyberhot och arbetar mot både privat och offentlig sektor, med fokus på samhällsviktig verksamhet.
   

  

 Vi har nu inlett en ny fas i vår utveckling. Samverkan med det nationella cybersäkerhetscentret (NCSC-SE) har intensifierats och den 1 juli 2026 kommer hela CERT-SE som funktion att överföras till NCSC-SE med FRA som huvudman.
   

  

 Alla vi som arbetar på Myndigheten för civilt försvar förväntas och ska bidra till ökad jämställdhet och likabehandling för en arbetsmiljö och ett samhälle fritt från diskriminering.
   

  

 Läs mer om vår organisation, förmåner och hur det är att arbeta hos oss
   

  

**Vill du veta mer?**
 Har du frågor är du välkommen att kontakta chef Olof Appelqvist. Fackliga företrädare är Carl Önne Saco, Jan Herremo ST, Josefin Berglund och Ann-Britt Paradis SEKO. Samtliga nås via växelnumret 0771-240 240.
   

  

**Välkommen med din ansökan senast den 5 april 2026.**
 Anställningsform Tillsvidare med provanställning Anställningens omfattning Heltid Tillträde Enligt överenskommelse Löneform Enligt överenskommelse Antal lediga befattningar 1 Sysselsättningsgrad 100% Ort Stockholm Län Stockholms län Land Sverige Referensnummer 2026/77 Publicerat 2026-03-18

title: Group Lead Research Innovation
description:
**R&D Group** 
**Leader** 
**Sherwin** 
**-Williams!** 




  





**Företag:** 
 Sherwin -Williams Sweden AB
 



**Plats:** 
 Märsta (Stockholm)
 



**Jobbkategori:** 
 Teknik
 



**Omfattning:** 
 Heltid
 



  





**Startdatum:** 
 Omgående eller enligt överenskommelse
 



 Är du driven, metodisk och gillar att arbeta med nästa teknologi, teoretiskt som väl praktiskt i labb? Vill du leda medarbetare i ett internationellt företag med möjlighet till utveckling? Sherwin -Williams är världsledande inom ytbehandling och söker nu efter en Gruppchef för avdelningen “ Reasearch and Innovation”.
 



  





**Om företaget** 




 Sherwin-Williams är världens största färgföretag och världsledande inom utveckling, tillverkning, distribution och försäljning av konsumentfärg och industriell ytbehandling. Globalt är vi över 63 000 medarbetare varav 330 i Sverige fördelade på fyra orter med tillverkning i Märsta och Bellö , centrallager i Nässjö samt med en helägd återförsäljare i Vaggeryd. I Sverige fokuserar vi på industriell ytbehandling av trä och metall där våra enheter utgör en central roll av vår totala försäljning i Europa.
 



  





**Om tjänsten** 




 Vi söker en
 **Gruppchef med kemisk eller teknisk bakgrund** 
 till en avdelning som ansvarar för konceptutveckling och utvärdering av ny teknologi inom färg- och lacksystem. Du rapporterar till forsknings- och utvecklingsdirektören och kommer arbeta nära kollegor både lokalt och globalt. Resor kan förekomma som en naturlig del av rollen.
 



 Tjänsten innebär att leda och utveckla en grupp specialister samt att säkerställa resurssättning och genomförande av projekt enligt vår stagegatemodell . Avdelningen är en nyckelkompetens inom kemi och teknik och ansvarar både för egna utvecklingsprojekt och för att ge tekniskt stöd till övriga organisationen.
 



  





**Exempel på arbetsuppgifter** 



* Leda, coacha och utveckla medarbetare inom flera teknologier för ytbehandling.
* Aktivt delta i både teoretiskt och praktiskt projektarbete för att möta uppsatta tidsplaner.
* Upprätthålla kontakt och samarbeten med forskningsinstitut och universitet.



 Vem är du?
 


* Du har högskoleutbildning inom kemi, kemiteknik, materialvetenskap eller motsvarande. Alternativt har du gedigen arbetslivserfarenhet från liknande bransch.
* Du behärskar svenska och engelska flytande i tal och skrift.



 Meriterande
 


* Erfarenhet från färg- och ytbehandlingsområdet.
* Tidigare erfarenhet av ledarskap eller chefsroll.
* Kunskaper i tyska.
* Bkörkort .



 För att lyckas i rollen tror vi att du
 


* Är initiativtagande, kommunikativ och trivs i en föränderlig miljö.
* Är noggrann, strukturerad och nyfiken.
* Har ett genuint intresse för att leda och utveckla medarbetare samt driva arbete framåt.



  





**Vad vi erbjuder** 




 Vi erbjuder en roll i ett internationellt företag med många kontaktytor och goda utvecklingsmöjligheter. Genom kollektivavtal, friskvårdsbidrag och andra personalförmåner värnar vi om din trygghet och ditt välmående.
 



 Tjänsten är en tillsvidareanställning som inleds med sex månaders visstidsanställning. Tillträde sker snarast möjligt. Inför anställning kommer du att genomgå en nyanställningsundersökning som bland annat inkluderar alkohol- och drogtest.
 



 Har du frågor om tjänsten är du välkommen att kontakta
 



**Anders Cunningham** 
 , rekryterande chef:
 *anders.cunningham@sherwin.com* 




**Vi ser fram emot din ansökan!** 




  





**About Us** 




 At Sherwin-Williams, our purpose is to inspire and improve the world by coloring and protecting what matters. Our paints, coatings and innovative solutions make the places and spaces in our world brighter and stronger. Your skills, talent and passion make it possible to live this purpose, and for customers and our business to achieve great results. Sherwin-Williams is a place that takes its stability, growth and momentum and translates it to possibility for our people. Our people are behind the strength of our success, and we invest and support you in:
 



 Life … with rewards, benefits and the flexibility to enhance your health and well-being
 



 Career … with opportunities to learn, develop new skills and grow your contribution
 



 Connection … with an inclusive team and commitment to our own and broader communities
 



 It's all here for you... let's Create Your
 **Possible** 




 Eligibility to Work
 



 You will need to provide proof of right to work. It is a condition of any offer of employment we make to you that you have the permission to work in the country for the role for which you are applying for.
 



 Equal Opportunity Employer
 



 An equal opportunity employer, all qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment and will not be discriminated against based on race, colour, religion or belief, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, ethnic or national origin, disability, age pregnancy or maternity, marital or civil partner status, or any other protected characteristic prohibited by law.
 



 Please be aware, Sherwin-Williams recruiting team members will never request a candidate to provide a payment, ask for financial information, or sensitive personal information like national identification numbers, date of birth, or bank account numbers during the application process.

title: Marketing Manager – Ad Tech & Measurement
description:
**What You Will Do**
 You will work at the intersection of paid media, engineering, and privacy to strengthen Klarna’s Ad Tech and measurement foundations. In this position, you will partner closely with Paid Media teams to enable effective campaign optimisation through reliable tracking, signal quality, and scalable measurement solutions. You will translate marketing needs into clear technical requirements, ensuring implementations are practical, compliant, and aligned with real-world use cases. By working hands-on with tools, data, and stakeholders, you will help solve complex measurement challenges and improve how Klarna operates in an evolving advertising ecosystem.
   

  

**Who You Are**
* 4–7+ years of experience in Ad Tech, MarTech, measurement, or related marketing technology positions
* Proven hands-on experience with tools such as Google Analytics (GA4), Google Tag Manager (client-side and server-side), and server-side event tracking
* Strong understanding of paid media measurement, attribution, and optimisation requirements
* Experience working closely with engineers and translating business needs into technical implementations
* Solid understanding of privacy, consent management, and operating in regulated environments such as GDPR
* Ability to work operationally with data, diagnose issues, and improve signal quality without reliance on a dedicated analyst
* Experience with advertising platform integrations such as Google Ads or Meta Ads, including features like Enhanced Conversions or Conversions API


**Awesome to have**
* Experience with mobile measurement and attribution (e.g. AppsFlyer or similar MMPs)
* Background in high-growth digital environments such as fintech, e-commerce, marketplaces, or gaming
* Experience with first-party data activation or CDPs
* Familiarity with incrementality testing or ROI measurement approaches
* Ability to simplify complex Ad Tech concepts for non-technical stakeholders


 Please include a CV in English
   

  

 Curious to learn more about Klarna and what it’s like to work here? Explore our career site!

title: Pédopsychiatre (relocate to Ireland)
description:
We are looking for Consultant Psychiatrists specialized in child and adolescent (Pédopsychiatre) to work in Ireland.
 



  





 Posts are based within a multidisciplinary team environment and focuses on assessment, diagnosis, treatment, and ongoing care for individuals under 18 years of age.
 



  





**These are specific purpose contracts of 12 months initially.** 




**Salaries between €235,862 to €283,318 per year based on experience working 37 hours per week.** 




**30 days of annual leave, 10 days of public holidays and up to 10 days of medical education leave.** 




  





 Main Duties & Responsibilities
 



  




* Deliver specialist assessment, diagnostic formulation, and treatment of mental illnesses and/or mental disorders in children and adolescents, in line with the National Standardised Operating Procedure for CAMHS and subsequent national policies and guidelines.
* Ensure duties are carried out in a timely manner to minimise delays for patients and service disruption.
* Maintain accurate, detailed, and contemporaneous medical records of all clinical interactions.
* Provide prompt notification to the Executive Clinical Director and the Mental Health Commission of any serious untoward incidents, in accordance with relevant regulations.
* Work collaboratively within a multidisciplinary team to provide a high standard of care.



  





 Eligibility Criteria
 



  





 Applicants must:
 


* Register as specialist in the Specialist Division of the Register of Medical Practitioners maintained by the Medical Council in Ireland (we will give full support to understand the process and apply for it).
* Specialist in
 **Child and Adolescent Psychiatry (Pédopsychiatre).**
* Experience as a specialist in child and adolescent psychiatry (minimum 3 months).
* Good english level
* Willing to relocate to Ireland

title: Key Account Manager
description:
**Elevate Your Career with Zalaris** 




 Zalaris is a rapidly expanding global leader in Tech HR and payroll solutions.
 



 We’re big enough for you to grow and be a part of an international environment but small enough for you to be visible and truly make a difference.
 



 We foster open communication and short decision-making paths that encourage creative and innovative thinking.
 



 Zalaris’ culture is rooted in values inspired by Nordic working ethos:
 **everyone matters, aiming high and team spirit** 
 . We’re committed to building a diverse, inclusive, and authentic workplace where everyone brings their own uniqueness. Zalaris’ employees come from different backgrounds, cultures, and walks of life, and we are proud of it.
 



  





**Role Summary** 




 Key Account Manager – Trusted Advisor with Strong Upsell & Business Development Skills
 



  





**Zalaris – Empowering People. Delivering Solutions.** 




 Do you enjoy building long-term customer relationships, navigating international environments, and uncovering new value within existing accounts?
 



 Zalaris is looking for Key Account Managers who combine excellent customer partnership skills with a proactive commercial mindset to drive growth within our HR & Payroll Managed Services portfolio.
 



  





 As a Key Account Manager at Zalaris, you take responsibility for the full customer lifecycle — from onboarding handover through ongoing collaboration and renewal.
 



 You act as a
 **trusted partner** 
 for HR leaders, ensuring high-quality service delivery and spotting opportunities for improvement and upsell.
 



 You will work closely with our Service Delivery teams, HR specialists, consultants, and internal stakeholders to ensure customers receive consistent value and a seamless experience across all touchpoints.
 



  





**Your Responsibilities** 



* Manage key customer relationships and ensure satisfaction throughout the contract lifecycle
* Lead renewals, upsell, cross-sale, and expansion opportunities
* Facilitate regular governance and operational meetings to ensure alignment and execution
* Act as the main point of contact for your customers, providing guidance and support
* Identify issues, improvement areas, and business opportunities that deliver measurable customer value
* Develop opportunities and maintain an active, healthy commercial pipeline
* Champion customer needs internally and coordinate across the matrix organization to drive outcomes



  





**Your Experience and Skills** 



* Experience as a key account manager in complex or international environments
* Strong commercial mindset with proven success in upsell, renewals, and account development
* Fluent in English and the Nordic language of your primary market
* Understanding of HRM services such as Payroll, Time & Attendance, Workforce Management, Travel & Expense, or HCM platforms (Workday, SuccessFactors, Oracle)
* Experience with Managed Services or Outsourcing (multi-country experience is a plus)
* Ability to communicate confidently with senior HR stakeholders
* Strong analytical and advisory abilities — able to structure issues and build customer-focused recommendations
* Excellent communication and facilitation skills
* Proactive, solution-oriented attitude with ownership for customer success
* Bonus: Experience from management consulting and proficiency in PowerPoint, Excel, CRM systems, Power BI, or AI tools



  





**Why Zalaris?** 



* Join a fast-growing, entrepreneurial company shaping the future of HR & Payroll services across Europe.
* Work with major global brands delivering high-impact solutions.
* Influence strategic decision-making at the customer’s highest levels.
* Experience a culture built on trust, innovation, accountability, and collaboration.



  





 If you want to make a difference, grow with your customers, and help transform HR in global organizations — we want to hear from you.
 



**Apply now and become the trusted advisors our customers rely on.**

title: Distribution Sales Manager
description:
**Own Every Moment at NetApp**
 At NetApp, your ideas power innovation. We lead in intelligent data infrastructure—delivering unified storage, integrated data services, and solutions that help organizations unlock the full potential of their data, from AI to multicloud.
   

  

 Ready to innovate and contribute to our path to $10B? Here, you'll collaborate with passionate teams, tackle real-world challenges, and see your impact in how customers transform and grow. If you're ready to bring curiosity, creativity, and drive to every moment, NetApp is where your journey begins.
   

  

**Job Summary**
 The Distribution Sales Manager will be responsible for the country’s channel strategy in engaging, motivating and growing our partners’ business in NetApp. They will be driving sales of NetApp's products and services, meeting sales goals, and promoting a preference for NetApp among partners through effective strategy and execution.
   

  

 Job Responsibilities
   

  

* Develop and maintain a multi-year sales strategy and business plan and tracking the success of selected Partners and the distributors.
* Designing plans and tracking activities with distributors to build pipeline generation plans to maintain consistent revenue every quarter.
* Manage the executive engagement between the partner and corresponding parts of the NetApp sales organization
* Plan, execute and track tactical activities to support bookings and pipeline generation
* Drive and support Partner to develop services practices and specializations
* Orchestrates enablement of Partner sales and technical teams in line with Program requirements and Solutions GTM
* Plans and manages Incentive Headcount resources
* Help Partners get the right readiness to drive solution and services sales
* Activate and run company initiatives and programs at Partners
* Drive Partner forecast accuracy and overall health
* Implement continues Installed Base expansion and retention strategies and tactics
* Collaborate with Partner’s and NetApp Commercial team (CTR/CAM) to develop Partner Driven Commercial business
* Collaborate with enterprise- and commercial account teams and Partner to create and execute pursuits


 Job Requirements
   

  

* A minimum of 8 years of experience working with Channel, Alliance, or ISV partners, along with a solid understanding of storage and infrastructure.
* Ability to effectively interface and communicate at many levels within Partner companies' organization
* Aptitude to negotiate and resolve complex situations/opportunities to a positive outcome while managing conflicts to maintain ecosystem of internal or external relationships
* Ability to collaborate with cross-functional teams
* Tactical skills to builds a network outside to support business needs
* Good understanding of and network within the industry ecosystem (Partners, competition etc.)
* Good knowledge of Cloud technologies and business models
* Ability to travel 2-3 days per week


 At NetApp, we embrace a hybrid working environment designed to strengthen connection, collaboration, and culture for all employees. This means that most roles will have some level of in-office and/or in-person expectations, which will be shared during the recruitment process.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer:**
 NetApp is firmly committed to Equal Employment Opportunity (EEO) and to compliance with all federal, state and local laws that prohibit employment discrimination based on age, race, color, gender, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, religion, disability or genetic information, pregnancy, protected veteran status, and any other protected classification.
   

  

**Why You'll Thrive at NetApp**
 At NetApp, you won't wait for the perfect moment—you'll make it. The early planning, the extra thought, the bold idea that turns good into great: That's how our people operate and how we continue to push the boundaries of data infrastructure.
   

  

 NetApp is the trusted partner for organizations transforming data into opportunity. As the only enterprise-grade storage service natively embedded in Google Cloud, AWS, and Microsoft Azure, we empower customers to run everything from traditional workloads to enterprise AI with unmatched performance, resilience, and security.
   

  

**Our culture**
 We celebrate mold breakers, bold thinkers, and problem solvers. We reward initiative, impact, and ownership. We provide flexibility so you can balance professional ambition with your personal life. Here, differences are not just welcomed—they drive everything we do.
   

  

 If you're ready to innovate, rise to the challenge, and own every moment - make your next move your best one. Apply now.

title: Senior User Experience Researcher(Bangkok - Based, Relocation provided)
description:
**About Agoda**
 At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.
   

  

 Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.
   

  

 No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.
   

  

**We have only scratched the surface.** 
 The online travel industry is an extremely dynamic and competitive space. Our aim is to deliver compelling designs that create a world-class customer experience. You will have a key role in defining the future of our products that reach millions of customers. Despite our size, we operate in a startup-like environment.
   

  

**Work in the heart of Asia.** 
 This is an amazing opportunity if you're looking for an exciting adventure abroad while expanding your international research capabilities. You get a chance to live in one of the most beautiful and most visited cities in the world!
   

  

**Work on AI products**
* Inform and help shape AI product vision and roadmap by translating strategic questions into research plans that guide direction and prioritization.
* Analyze the online travel ecosystem and evolving AI trends to identify user needs, pain points, and opportunities that feed product strategy and bets.
* Evaluate AI‑powered products and features end‑to‑end — from early concepts to post‑launch optimization — using mixed methods and rapid iteration alongside PMs and designers


 UX Researchers own end-to-end planning, execution, analysis and reporting of research projects, and consistently achieve research outputs needed by Product teams to inform strategic decisions. The research findings of UX Researchers impact Agoda's business success by informing Product teams regarding design or design process, end user experience, product direction, market strategy or similar.
   

  

**Qualifications:**
* Master Degree or equivalent experience in Computer Science, Human Computer Interaction, Information Science, Psychology, Social Science, or any related field
* 10+ years of relevant experience in consumer-facing business domains
* You are very comfortable with planning, scoping, conducting, analyzing and communicating research
* Experience with Qualitative and user-centered design methods (individual and group interviews, diary studies, direct observation, think-aloud usability testing, etc.)
* Experience with Quantitative research (metrics, survey design, response effects, sampling, crosstabs, and statistical concepts, etc.)
* Experience in evaluating, negotiating, and working with external research vendors
* Be able to describe user problems and business opportunities to a variety of stakeholders by leveraging both quantitative and qualitative data
* You are able to demonstrate critical thinking beyond business requests
* You are a great storyteller and communicator, able to speak fluently to business people, designers, engineers and other stakeholders (in English)
* You enjoy collaborative work in a dynamic, data-driven and creative environment


**Responsibilities:**
 General Role Expectations:
   

  

* Demonstrates critical thinking beyond explicit business requests
* Functions independently in all operational research tasks
* Leads core end-to-end research activities - including driving research objectives, hypotheses, methodology, execution, analysis, and communication


 Research Skills:
   

  

* Good judgement when evaluating research opportunities, e.g. importance, urgency, and impact for team
* Ability to reasonably challenge details of research requests, and propose solid research solutions
* Strong project execution with existing skills while constantly expanding his/her breadth and depth of abilities.
* Knowledge of approaches for both quantitative and qualitative research, effectively triangulating findings, methods, and theories with others.
* Application of tools and inspection methods to quantify the value and efficiency of research
* Ability to adopt and adapt well-established methods according to product/project situations, and innovate new methods in collaboration with more senior researchers
* Knowledge of or ability to quickly learn key software tools common in the field (e.g. for surveys, diary studies, analysis)
* Knowledge of data compliance and ethics in all of their activities.


 Collaboration & Collaboration:
   

  

* Drives cross-discipline/department collaboration via research insights/activities.
* Collaborates efficiently with other researchers and other disciplines, with clear commitments in case of shared ownership.
* Demonstrates excellent communication skills; tailors communication style for different audiences, concise and to the point, open to taking input and feedback


 Research Community Contributions:
   

  

* Contributes to the research community in one or more ways - sharing work/ methodologies, coaching and/or mentoring other core or junior researchers, screening of Research candidates


**This position is open to worldwide candidates and we will assist you with a generous relocation package, ensuring a smooth transition to working and living in Bangkok.**
 #seattle #sanfrancisco #beijing #newyork #london #bangkok #singapore #chicago #hongkong #singapore #berlin #shanghai #losangeles #boston #austin #toronto #luxembourg #munich #oslo #copenhagen #stockholm #helsinki #brussels #hamburg #stuttgart #taipei #hamburg #stuttgart #dublin #telaviv #sydney #melbourne #perth #vancouver #montreal #prague #paris #dublin #telaviv #milan #rome #amsterdam #moscow #saintpetersburg #frankfurt #shenzhen #istanbul #dubai #kiev #seoul

**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 At Agoda, we pride ourselves on being a company represented by people of all different backgrounds and orientations. We prioritize attracting diverse talent and cultivating an inclusive environment that encourages collaboration and innovation. Employment at Agoda is based solely on a person’s merit and qualifications. We are committed to providing equal employment opportunity regardless of sex, age, race, color, national origin, religion, marital status, pregnancy, sexual orientation, gender identity, disability, citizenship, veteran or military status, and other legally protected characteristics.

If we receive unsolicited or speculative CVs, we reserve the right to contact and hire the candidate directly without any obligation to pay a recruitment fee.

title: Affärsstöd
description:
Är du strukturerad, serviceinriktad och intresserad av it affären?
   

  

 I rollen som affärsstöd har du en central roll i kundens leveransresa där fokus ligger på tekniska produkter och affärer, främst inom nätverk och säkerhet. Du arbetar nära våra specialistsäljare, ansvarar för administration och uppföljning i leveransen och fungerar som en rådgivande kontakt mot kunden.
   

  

 Vi erbjuder en arbetsplats som präglas av engagemang, personligt ansvar och samarbete – där vi tillsammans bygger Sverige med it.
   

  

**Din roll**
 I rollen som affärsstöd jobbar du uppstöttande mot våra specialistsäljare i relationen till kunden när det kommer till vår produktleverans. Du ansvarar för att kvalitén alltid är på topp i överlämning till leverans och du säkerställer att ömsesidiga förväntningar mellan Atea och kund uppfylls. Du har en säljande roll men ditt fokus ligger på kvalitet, administration och uppföljning i vår leverans och från kundens sida är du en rådgivande part, och en av nyckelpersonerna på Atea för att identifiera affärsmöjligheter hos kunden. Du arbetar främst inom it-området nätverk och säkerhet och framförallt Ciscos produkt- och tjänsteportfölj.
   

  

 Dina huvudsakliga arbetsuppgifter:
   

  

* Ger service, följer upp och arbetar med merförsäljning gentemot kund
* Administration i logistikflödet för vår leverans mot kunder
* Ta fram offerter och prisförslag till kund
* Agera stöd för våra specialistsäljare och gentemot kunden i produktleveransen


**Vem är du?**
 Du har ett proaktivt förhållningssätt och söker lösningar i uppkomna problem där du fungerar konstruktivt både på egen hand och i grupp. Då du kommer jobba med våra kund- och leveransflöden är det viktigt att du är administrativt lagd och är van att jobba med god struktur och noggrannhet. Att kontinuerligt arbeta med återkoppling, god service och dokumentation i alla riktningar är för dig en självklarhet. Du har en positiv inställning till förändring och du vill fortsätta utvecklas i din yrkesroll. Du är bra på att skapa relationer och ger ett förtroendeingivande och trovärdigt intryck.
   

  

 För tjänsten som affärstöd har du med dig:
   

  

* Erfarenhet av att arbeta med administration och med försäljning genom service i toppklass
* Grundläggande kunskap om Ciscos produkt- och tjänsteportfölj, samt ett intresse för it och it‑produkter
* Grundläggande kunskaper i Officepaketet
* Minst gymnasiekompetens
* Tala och skriva obehindrat på både svenska och engelska


 Meriterande:
   

  

* Erfarenhet att jobba i något affärssystem
* Erfarenhet av globala tillverkare


**Om Atea**
 Visste du att Atea är den ledande leverantören av it-infrastruktur i Norden och Baltikum? I Sverige är vi runt 2700 medarbetare fördelade på 35 kontor runt om i hela landet. Vår styrka ligger i vår kombination av lokal närvaro, vårt omfattande och heltäckande erbjudande samt alla våra specialister. Tillsammans med våra kunder och partners bygger vi Sverige med it och förbättra vardagen för skolbarn, lärare, äldre, sjukvård och näringslivet. Hos oss får du vara en del av världens mest hållbara it-servicebolag, där vi är med och påskyndar omställningen mot en mer hållbar it-värld.
   

  

 På Atea blir du en del av en vardag och en kultur som präglas av framåtanda, laganda och humor. Vi har en vision om att vara "The Place to Be" – en plats där alla växer och trivs, med kollegor som bryr sig om dig, om kunderna och om samhället.
   

  

**Kontakt & mer information**
 Har du frågor om tjänsten är du varmt välkommen att kontakta rekryterande chef, Markus Timonen, markus.timonen@atea.se. Vi hanterar ansökningar löpande och tjänsten kan tillsättas innan sista ansökningsdatum, ansök därmed redan idag!
   

  

 I den här rekryteringen kan arbetspsykologiska tester användas som en del av urvalsprocessen. För vissa tjänster genomgår slutkandidater en bakgrundskontroll, detta för att öka kännedomen om dig som vår framtida medarbetare.
   

  

 Vår arbetssätt är flexibelt - Vi tror på att ge möjlighet till flexibilitet i vardagen men merparten av arbetstiden som vi inte spenderar hos en kund eller på resande fot utgår vi från kontoret, som är vår primära arbetsplats.
   

  

 Välkommen med din ansökan!
   

  

**Följ oss i sociala medier**

title: Senior Product Designer - Flights (Bangkok - Based, Relocation Provided)
description:
**About Agoda**
 At Agoda, we bridge the world through travel. Our story began in 2005, when two lifelong friends and entrepreneurs, driven by their passion for travel, launched Agoda to make it easier for everyone to explore the world.
   

  

 Today, we are part of Booking Holdings [NASDAQ: BKNG], with a diverse team of over 7,000 people from 90 countries, working together in offices around the globe. Every day, we connect people to destinations and experiences, with our great deals across our millions of hotels and holiday properties, flights, and experiences worldwide.
   

  

 No two days are the same at Agoda. Data and technology are at the heart of our culture, fueling our curiosity and innovation. If you’re ready to begin your best journey and help build travel for the world, join us.
   

  

**Get to Know Our Design Team:**
 The Design team is a diverse group of product designers and researchers that help to build Agoda’s products from our home office in Bangkok. Being a product-driven company, we constantly partner with product managers and engineers to understand user problems and design workflows, interactions, and visual interfaces.
   

  

 There is always an opportunity for growth here. Focus on your craft to improve or expand your skill set, or step into a managerial role and flex your talents as a designer and driver of team projects. This is a great time to join a team that’s small enough to be scrappy and hands on, yet big enough to influence change and product strategy.
   

  

 At Agoda, we offer a range of travel products – including accommodations, flights, and activities – and are building the next generation of travel experiences to help customers plan and book their entire trip. We’re looking for a
 **Senior Product Designer, Flights** 
 to help transform the way users search for, book, and manage flights.
   

  

 As a
 **Senior Product Designer, Flights** 
 , you’ll focus on end-to-end user journeys, leading the design of intuitive and engaging experiences that make every step from enabling users to discover, search, book and manage their flights seamlessly on Agoda. In this role, you’ll drive design strategy, collaborate closely with cross-functional teams, and ensure our flight products set the benchmark for usability and innovation in the online travel industry.
   

  

 In your day-to-day work, you’ll turn strategy into actionable design solutions by setting design direction, solving complex challenges, and delivering experiences that are intuitive, scalable, and grounded in user insights. You’ll champion user needs throughout the product lifecycle, using research and data to continuously refine our flight offerings.
   

  

**Experience Requirements & Role Expectations:**
* 6+ years of full-time experience as a product designer for digital or web-based products; in-house experience highly preferred.
* Create visually stunning, intuitive, and delightful interfaces, and independently deliver pixel-perfect UI and seamless interactions. You sweat the details and care deeply about craft.
* You are highly experienced in UI design, with deep knowledge of design patterns and a creative approach to solving problems through user interfaces.
* Proficient in both quantitative and qualitative research, with hands-on experience running user interviews, synthesizing findings, and generating actionable insights to inform design decisions.
* Take full ownership of the design process for a dedicated scrum, from discovery to delivery. You’ll set the design vision, define the user experience, and ensure high-quality execution.
* Partner with Product managers to shape product vision and roadmap. You’ll use data, research, and business context to inform your design decisions, always balancing user needs with business goals.
* Has experience of managing multiple stakeholders within an agile development process
* Strong communicator who can articulate design rationale, influence stakeholders, and build trust across disciplines.
* A strong portfolio of work that demonstrates your design thinking, process, and solutions showcasing beautiful, user-centered web and mobile product design.


**Day to day, it looks like:**
* Develop design solutions that address both business objectives and customer needs
* Manage and communicate with stakeholders to ensure alignment and on-time delivery of features
* Test prototypes and hypotheses with users to gather actionable feedback
* Present your work to peers and leadership, both asynchronously and in person
* Participate in weekly design critiques, workshops, all-hands, and team meetings
* Document your design process and clearly articulate your decisions
* Champion cohesion and consistency in UX design across our expanding suite of products and features
* Bring a strategic vision to implementing experiences that balance customer needs with business, content, and technology


**Senior Product Designer at Agoda means you have a track record of:**
* You work alongside your design partners in driving discovery and ideation workshops and align the group around a vision and approach
* You have a track record of crafting sophisticated flows and customer journeys
* You can think and craft at a system level, not just interface elements or pages
* You’ll regularly make use of your soft skills: listening, negotiating, decision-making
* You can balance multiple priorities and successfully deliver in a fast-paced, dynamic environment.


**Qualities we value in designers:**
* Effective articulation of ideas and design solutions
* Demonstrates initiative and proactively communicates
* Expressing feedback with kindness and candor
* Tolerance for ambiguity and healthy curiosity
* Translation of quantitative & qualitative insights into design decisions
* Contribution to our culture: motivation, optimism, quality, integrity


 #seattle #sanfrancisco #beijing #newyork #london #bangkok #singapore #chicago #hongkong #singapore #berlin #shanghai #losangeles #boston #austin #toronto #luxembourg #munich #oslo #copenhagen #stockholm #helsinki #brussels #hamburg #stuttgart #taipei #hamburg #stuttgart #dublin #telaviv #sydney #melbourne #perth #vancouver #montreal #prague #paris #dublin #telaviv #milan #rome #amsterdam #moscow #saintpetersburg #frankfurt #shenzhen #istanbul #dubai #kiev #seoul
