title: Digital Project Manager - Healthcare Software
description:
**Digital Project Manager – Healthcare Software**  

  

**Make your next move matter**  

  

We are looking for an experienced Digital Project Manager – Healthcare Software to accelerate the development, deployment, and scaling of next‑generation digital health solutions.
In this role, you will collaborate with data scientists, clinicians, and product teams to turn insights into real‑world impact, faster and smarter. If you are passionate about cloud-native engineering, responsible AI, and using cutting‑edge technologies to advance global health, keep on reading.  

  

Our aim is to establish a full new team of 10 dedicated colleagues, all committed to build a strong team and deliver the extraordinary in our aim to innovate and build the next generation digital health solutions. We believe we do this in close day-to-day collaboration in the headquarters of Mölnlycke, situated in GoCo, Mölndal/Gothenburg. **What you’ll do**
As Digital Project Manager, you will lead the end to end delivery of healthcare software initiatives, from early stage innovation and needs discovery, through scaled high quality implementation. The role translates clinical, technical, and business insights into clearly defined problems, validated concepts, and tangible product increments while ensuring alignment with clinical value, regulatory requirements, and strategic goals. It involves coordinating cross functional stakeholders to deliver secure, compliant digital health solutions and driving early concept validation through rapid prototyping and real-world testing, including projects that span embedded software, IoT, and device–cloud architectures. You will role model with situational leadership, drive lessons learned and secure knowledge transfer within the organization. **Other key responsibilities for the role:*** Lead end to end delivery of healthcare software initiatives across the full lifecycle from early discovery to launch, ensuring clinical value, regulatory compliance, and strategic alignment.
* Lead early-stage innovation and concept validation, including unmet need identification, opportunity prioritization, and business case development aligned with Bio-design principles.
* Lead project planning, execution, and delivery performance, including scope, timelines, resources, budgets, and KPIs.
* Proactively lead risk assessment, compliance, and quality oversight, ensuring patient safety, regulatory adherence, and release readiness.
* Drive forecast/budgeting and vendor accountability, including management of R&D budgets, external partners, and contracted deliverables.
* Lead change, adoption, and delivery success, supporting go live, user adoption, stabilization, and continuous improvement.
* Lead continuous improvement of delivery frameworks and governance, contributing to best practices, playbooks, and data driven decision making.
* Stakeholder Management: Secure involvement and commitment, communicate progress, flag risks, and ensure quality in project reporting.

 **If all that sounds appealing, then here is what we would like you to demonstrate:*** University degree, preferably in Software Engineering, Health Informatics, Computer Science, or other relevant area, or equivalent mix of education and experience
* 5+ years managing digital or software development projects, preferably in healthcare/health-tech.
* Experience with early-stage innovation projects, needs-finding, concept development, and feasibility work.
* Familiarity with, or training in, the Stanford Bio-design approach.
* Proven delivery of cross functional projects from discovery through launch.
* Experience coordinating clinical stakeholders and navigating healthcare delivery environments.
* Track record with Agile methodologies, including backlog management and iterative development.
* Experience managing budgets, vendors, and partnerships.
* Experience in working with AI-powered development projects
* High proficiency in English.

 **Additional experience we see as a benefit for the role:*** Agile/PM: PSM/PSPO, CSM, SAFe, ACP, PMP.
* Innovation/Design: Design Thinking, Bio-design courses/fellowships, human-centered design certifications.
* Technical: API, cloud fundamentals, cybersecurity or privacy courses.

 **What can we offer you?*** A collaborative environment with friendly colleagues in a global organisation that values openness, fairness, and teamwork.
* Competitive benefits package: annual bonus, pension plan, health insurance, and wellness contribution.
* A great workplace in the beautiful new head quarter in the GoCo, Mölndal. A place you gladly spend the required 3 days in office per week.
* Flexible working hours and a supportive work-from-home policy.

 **Our approach to Diversity and Inclusion**
We’re building a workplace where everyone feels seen, heard, and valued. We believe that a diverse mix of people (from different cultures, ages, geographies, and genders) makes us stronger. It brings fresh perspectives, drives better decisions, and helps us deliver solutions that reflect the world we serve. Inclusion isn’t just a value, it’s how we work, grow, and lead together.  

Please contact hiring manager Daniel Bünger von Wurm, Daniel.Bunger@molnlycke.com, if you have any questions about the role. **Please submit your application by April 12, 2026.**

title: Full-stack engineer with AI focus
description:
**About Solvigo**

Solvigo is a fast-growing AI company with clients across retail, finance, insurance, and other sectors. We work with making companies AI-first by leading a wide range of different projects, from conducting AI-interviews to developing HITL (human-in-the-loop) solutions to automate and optimize different workflows, as well as being a product hub of SaaS-solutions that we aim to scale over time. We are operating on the principle of automating the boring, mundane tasks, so our clients can focus on creating value.

At Solvigo, we like to maintain a culture that encourages learning and creativity. We host weekly learnability sessions, workshops with industry professionals, as well as allowing you to lead your own projects and design your own solutions while also providing guidance. As we're still a company in its infancy, you will have lots of opportunities to explore your own ideas to shape the company moving forward.

However, we're not all work and no play. We also host regular team-building activities and AW:s where we get to know each other as a time and learn to work together. We reside in our central office at Valhallavägen with a wide selection of stores, restaurants, and services nearby.

**What we're looking for**

We're looking for a solutions-oriented AI engineer to join our team full time. Ideally, we're looking for someone that has one or more of:

* 1-2 years of professional experience with development, particularly full-stack development with **FastAPI (Python), React (Javascript),** and **Postgress.**
* Experience working with cloud providers, such as **GCP, AWS or Azure**, working with a **microservice architecture,** as well as using **Docker.**
* Experience setting up multi-agentic systems utilizing **LangGraph**, **Google Agent Development Kit**, or similar.
* A solid problem-solving ability. We're not creating simple specs for you to follow, we're allowing you to create and maintain your own solutions with the given constraints and requirements.
* Proficiency in **English** and **Swedish**.
* Good communication skills and the ability to work in a team.

**Apply if:** You are a self-starter, you enjoy the high-paced environment of a newly started company and you want to see your code actually impact a client’s business within weeks rather than months.

**Skip if:** You prefer highly structured environments, clear 9-to-5 boundaries, or want to focus *only* on deep research/model training rather than full-stack implementation.

**What we offer**

* Competitive salary.
* Central office in Östermalm, Stockholm.
* Team-building activities and AW:s.
* Ambitious environment that promotes learning and creativity.
* The opportunity of joining our journey early and shape the company for the future.

**Note to Recruiters and Agencies:** We are managing this recruitment process entirely in-house. We do not accept unsolicited CVs or proposals from recruitment firms, headhunters, or outsourcing agencies.

Job Type: Full-time

Work Location: In person

title: Senior Customer Success Manager
description:
***Ready to join the clear market leader and help pioneer the future of Invoice Lifecycle Management?***


*If you're excited by growth, inspired by innovation, and want to be part of a company with a strong integrity and a supportive, value-driven culture, this is your opportunity to join the team that’s taking Invoice Lifecycle Management to new heights—and reshaping the future of finance.*


*At Basware, we didn’t just create the electronic invoice—we revolutionized how the world’s largest organizations manage, automate, and control their Accounts Payable operations. Basware has already processed over $10 trillion invoices—ensuring tax compliance, eliminating errors, and preventing fraud in jurisdictions across the globe.*


*Recognized as the #1 solution in our category by top analyst firms like Gartner, Forrester, and IDC, Basware is trusted by more than 6,000 customers worldwide—including many of the most iconic global brands. We’re proud to support their finance teams with mission-critical SaaS software that delivers clear and compelling value to CFOs and their organizations.*



As a **Senior Customer Success Manager**, you will be part of the Basware Customer Success organization focused on our strategic accounts. The role of Customer Success is to provide services that help Basware customers adopt, optimize, and accelerate the benefits of their Basware solutions and services.



This hybrid position is to join our Nordic team, based out of our Stockholm office, and will involve working with named strategic customers across multiple sectors—typically on a global scale—to ensure they realize maximum business value from their investment in Basware. Fully remote working can also be considered within other areas in Sweden.



The person we are looking for will need to have a strong focus and passion for driving adoption, customer retention, customer satisfaction and be comfortable playing a leading role when coordinating across Basware to deliver on success and improvement plans. You will also be comfortable speaking with all customer contacts at all levels, from AP teams to the C suite.


**Key job tasks & responsibilities:**


**Develop and implement strategies for customer success**


* Create, maintain, and implement achievable customer success plans at any stage of the customer lifecycle. Continuously monitor, measure, guide and align both customer stakeholders and others within Basware to ensure tangible business outcomes are achieved and can be a reference


**Act confidently as a networked purchase-to-pay practitioner and trusted advisor**


* Be able to continuously collect and provide both customers and others within Basware valuable guidance on best practice, industry trends and relevant benchmarks. Develop trusted relationships, including at the c-level, and engage to influence.


**Ensure successful ramp-up and adoption of Basware solutions and services**

* Provide guidance and steering decisions to the Basware and Customer implementation teams to ensure agreed upon business outcomes are met and/or mitigation strategies are activated
* Create, implement, and measure user and supplier adoption strategies linked to customer’s business outcomes. Actively measure adoption to identify and pursue opportunities. Work with customers and across internal teams, including product owners, to improve solutions and services and meet adoption objectives
* Identify opportunities where the customer would benefit from the use of additional Basware products. Work with the Sales teams in positioning the value and closing the sale of add on products and services


**Manage operational activities to ensure success**

* Be accountable for the successful delivery of success and service improvement plans, working both cross-functionally and at times leading virtual teams to deliver agreed actions in a coordinated manner and to optimize the customer experience
* Deliver services designed to drive customer success, including workshops, coaching, and profiling customer’s maturity across sourcing, procurement, and finance to identify opportunities


**Deliver and support the development of success services**


* Contribute to refining existing or develop new methodology, frameworks, and tools based on experience, research, and analysis


**Cross collaborate with the Basware Sales teams**


* Identify and create opportunities to grow the Basware pipeline
* Own the account in terms of renewals and upsells and actively drive these

  
**Skills & Requirements**
-------------------------

To thrive and succeed in this role, you will have significant experience in a customer facing, service-oriented role within a SaaS environment. Experience in Finance, procure-to-pay software systems and/or enterprise software applications, will be beneficial.



This is a fast paced and dynamic environment. We value employees who are confident, work well independently and in teams, are solution focused and for who adding value for the customer is a key focus area.


**Required competencies and experience:**


* Experience in a Senior Success Manager role with demonstrated ability in driving software adoption and increasing revenue
* Experience in Continuous business improvement and value creation for the customer, through driving and optimizing the adoption. Ability to drive business outcomes discussions and lead the customers
* Experience working with global customers with local head offices and other European countries where Basware is located
* Demonstrated ability to drive and close up-selling opportunities with the customer base
* Experience of working in a global matrix organization with geographically distributed teams
* Compliance and IT Security awareness and good understanding of Security protocols
* Strong written and verbal communication skills in English and Swedish
* Self-driven and target oriented
* Excellent presentation skills with a capability of leveraging business terms to relay solutions simply
* Ability to manage difficult situations and escalations with customers
* Bachelor's or Master's degree required



Awareness of artificial intelligence concepts, tools, or applications is considered a strong asset. We highly value candidates who demonstrate curiosity, a proactive mindset and a willingness to explore and incorporate AI-driven technologies into their work. We support continuous learning in this area.


**Why Basware?**



We’re a purpose-driven company with a global footprint and a collaborative culture. At Basware, you’ll work with passionate professionals, cutting-edge technology, and a shared commitment to innovation and excellence.


**Ready to make an impact?**



If you're excited by the challenge, **apply now and help shape the future of Basware.**



Please submit your resume and cover letter by clicking the ‘*I’m interested*’ link.



Our recruitment process will include pre-employment actions such as an enhanced background screening by a third party and reference checks.


**Basware. Now it all just happens.**


We Drive Customer Value


We Take Ownership


We Are Bold


  
**About the company**
---------------------

Basware is how the world’s best finance teams gain complete control of every invoice, every time. Our Intelligent Invoice Lifecycle Management Platform ensures end-to-end efficiency, compliance and control for all invoice transactions. Powered by the world’s most sophisticated invoice-centric AI – trained on over 2 billion invoices – Basware's Intelligent Automation drives real ROI by transforming finance operations. We serve 6,500+ customers globally and are trusted by industry leaders including DHL, Heineken and Sony. Fueled by 40 years of specialized expertise with $10+ trillion in total spend handled, we are pioneering the next era of finance.


Joining Basware means you’ll join a team filled with innovators, passionate about their work and enthusiastic about the industry we’ve pioneered. You’ll work alongside highly motivated, capable, and friendly individuals who collaborate to deliver world-class solutions and services. A critical part of our culture is the high amount of trust we put into our employees—we want everyone to make a difference, so we offer flexibility in how you work, giving you the freedom and support to deliver your best results. We truly live our values where:


**We Drive Customer Value**, **We Take Ownership** and **We Are Bold** in everything we do, to **make it all just happen for our customers.**

  

  

Enable "functional cookies" to watch the video


**2025**
Gartner Magic Quadrant Leader for Accounts Payable Applications. Basware and Deloitte create Center of Excellence
**2024**
Launch of World’s 1st AP-Powered GenAI

**2022**
Basware became a privately-held corporation in a go-private transaction led by software private equity firm Accel-KKR

title: Enterprise Architect
description:
**Om tjänsten**  

Vill du vara med i nästa datadrivna utvecklingsfas för fastighetsmarknaden? Vi på Maxitech har fått förtroendet att hjälpa vår kund med tre nya roller som syftar till att optimera driften, bli mer kostnadseffektiva och omvandla data till insikter. Om du vill vara med på denna utvecklingsresa där du ges mandat att kunna förändra och verka inom en entreprenöriell miljö med korta beslutsvägar – läs vidare!



Vår kund  

En av Nordens mest dynamiska fastighetsaktörer, med verksamhet över flera europeiska marknader och en affärsmodell som kombinerar långsiktigt ägande med hög förändringstakt.  

Här finns ett tydligt entreprenöriellt driv, korta beslutsvägar och en kultur där idéer får ta plats och kan realiseras. Samtidigt präglas organisationen av ett långsiktigt perspektiv där hållbara investeringar och utveckling står i fokus.  

Det är en miljö där affär, teknik och utveckling möts och där du får möjlighet att vara med och påverka riktning framåt.


**Arbetsuppgifter**  

* Driva och utveckla målarkitekturen för system- och applikationslandskapet
* Omsätta affärsbehov till tekniska riktlinjer och vägval
* Agera tekniskt stöd i större initiativ och hjälpa organisationen att fatta rätt beslut
* Arbeta nära team och intressenter för att säkerställa att arkitekturen fungerar i praktiken
* Aktivt bidra till att utveckla arbetssätt och skapa långsiktigt hållbara lösningar

**Din profil**  

Som person har du förmåga att göra det komplexa begripligt och skapa tydlighet. Vi ser att du rör dig naturligt mellan affär och teknik samt att du vill förstå bakomliggande faktorer och inte bara lösningen. Du kombinerar ett strategiskt perspektiv med en ”operativ” inställning för att hjälpa organisationen framåt. Vidare är du en samarbetsinriktad person som enkelt kan skapa förtroende, bygga tillit och aktivt bidrar till att främja nybyggarandan.


Vi tror att du har:  

* En bakgrund inom arkitektur som enterprise architect, lösningsarkitekt eller liknande och är van att arbeta i miljöer där helhet och riktning är avgörande
* Erfarenhet av att forma målarkitektur och förstår hur system, data och integrationer hänger ihop i praktiken
* Kunskap om moderna arkitekturmönster som API:er och eventdrivna flöden och har en god teknisk grund
* Erfarenhet av plattformar och lösningar i moderna miljöer, gärna i molnet
* Förmåga att översätta verksamhetens behov till hållbara tekniska lösningar
* Tidigare arbetat i en roll där du har guidat och utvecklat team och arbetssätt
* Goda kunskaper i Svenska och Engelska i både tal och skrift


Det är meriterande om du har erfarenhet av fastighetsbranschen eller av en förändringsresa, exempelvis inom cloud.


**Övrigt**  

Ort: Göteborg  

Anställningsform: Tillsvidareanställning med 6 månaders provanställning  

Start: Omgående  

Arbetstid: Kontorstider



Rekryteringsprocess  

Vi tillämpar löpande urval och tar inte emot CV via e-mail.


**Om oss**  

Maxitech är ett IT-/Tech-konsultbolag som arbetar med några av branschens skarpaste konsulter. Vi erbjuder även direkta rekryteringslösningar för våra kunder och anpassar våra tjänster efter deras specifika behov


  
Kategori
**Data/IT**
Tjänsten
**Projektledare, IT**
Placeringsort
**Göteborg**
Yrkesområde
**Tillsvidareanställning**
Omfattning
**Heltid**
Sista ansökningsdag
**21/04/2026**

title: Product Owner – Meta
description:
**Stockholm / Hybrid** 




 Amanda AI is a fully automated digital marketing platform for creating and optimizing digital ads on Google, Meta, and Bing. Our vision is to be the leading platform for digital marketing. By eliminating the manual work of advertising, we streamline and optimize campaigns using machine learning, driving profitability for our 450+ clients. Amanda AI was founded in 2018 and continues to grow rapidly as the product evolves and we expand into new markets globally.
 



 As part of the Amanda AI team, you’ll join a social and skilled group of people who are passionate about what they do. You’ll also have the opportunity to contribute to a cutting-edge adtech product and make a real impact.
 



  





**The Role: Product Owner – Meta** 




 As Product Owner for our Meta solution, you will own and drive the development of one of Amanda AI’s most important product areas. You will be responsible for translating customer needs and market insights into clear product priorities, ensuring we continue to build a best-in-class automation solution for paid social.
 



 In this role, you sit at the intersection of Product, Tech, Customer Success, and Commercial teams. You will gather insights from clients and internal stakeholders, define requirements, and work closely with developers to bring new features and improvements to life.
 



 You will also act as a subject matter expert in paid social, supporting internal teams and occasionally engaging directly with clients to understand their challenges and opportunities.
 



 This is a strategic and hands-on role requiring strong product thinking, deep social media expertise, and excellent stakeholder management skills.
 



  





**To succeed in this role, we believe you:** 



* Have a strong background in paid social, especially Meta advertising.
* Are comfortable translating business and client needs into product requirements.
* Thrive in cross-functional environments and enjoy collaborating with tech teams.
* Are structured, analytical, and able to prioritize effectively.
* Have strong communication skills and enjoy working in client-facing contexts.
* Are proactive, solution-oriented, and comfortable in a fast-moving scale-up environment.



  





**The three best things about this job** 



* You will shape the future of Amanda AI’s paid social automation and have real product impact.
* You will work closely with talented colleagues across product, tech, and commercial teams.
* You will be part of a fast-growing adtech company where ideas move quickly into reality.



  





**We think you have...** 



* Hands-on experience as a Social Specialist (agency or in-house).
* Experience working in an agency environment or closely with agency teams.
* Solid experience from client-facing roles.
* Proven project management experience, preferably in product, marketing, or tech environments.
* A strong understanding of the Meta advertising ecosystem.
* Experience working in SaaS or adtech is a plus.



  





**What we offer** 




 Amanda AI is committed to innovation, customer success, and a collaborative work culture. We believe in listening to all voices and supporting our team to reach their highest potential.
 



 We also offer:
 


* 30 days of paid vacation
* Annual wellness allowance of SEK 5,000
* Generous pension policy
* Hybrid work model
* A centrally located office in Stockholm



  
 



**Ready to get started?** 




 If you’re excited about joining Amanda AI and want to make an impact from day one, we’d love to hear from you. Apply today—interviews are ongoing!

title: Advisory Solution Consultant - Moveworks
description:
**Company Description**
 Moveworks is the Agentic AI Assistant platform that empowers the entire workforce.
   

  

 Our platform enables employees to converse with all of their business systems through natural language to quickly find answers and automate tasks. Powered by the world's most advanced LLMs, our proprietary models, and a sophisticated Agentic AI platform, we're transforming how work gets done by allowing AI to take initiative, streamline complex workflows, and continuously learn and adapt.
   

  

 Moveworks is trusted by over 5.5 million employees at more than 350 of the world’s largest companies, including 10% of the Fortune 500, to automate everyday tasks and streamline business operations. Recognized on the Forbes Cloud 100 and AI 50 lists, Moveworks was also named one of Fast Company’s 2025 Most Innovative Companies and Inc’s Best in Business, in the Best in Innovation category. Moveworks was also recognized at Microsoft’s 2025 Partner of the Year and in 2024, received the AI Breakthrough Award.
   

  

 In December 2025, Moveworks was acquired by ServiceNow, marking a pivotal milestone in our journey to create a single front door to work for all business systems. By combining ServiceNow’s leading workflow automation with Moveworks’ Reasoning Engine and natural language capabilities, we deliver the AI platform for every person and every workflow. Built to go beyond basic summaries to deliver meaningful business impact. Together, our AI acts across enterprise systems to turn conversations into completed work.
   

  

 By joining our team, you’ll be at the forefront of the AI transformation, backed by the global scale of ServiceNow and the agility of a high-growth company. We are looking for world-class talent to help us extend agentic AI to every employee across every corner of the business.
   

  

 Come join us!
   

  

**ServiceNow**
 It all started in sunny San Diego, California in 2004 when a visionary engineer, Fred Luddy, saw the potential to transform how we work. Fast forward to today — ServiceNow stands as a global market leader, bringing innovative AI-enhanced technology to over 8,100 customers, including 85% of the Fortune 500®. Our intelligent cloud-based platform seamlessly connects people, systems, and processes to empower organizations to find smarter, faster, and better ways to work. But this is just the beginning of our journey. Join us as we pursue our purpose to make the world work better for everyone.
   

  

**Job Description**
**What you get to do in this role:**
 The Moveworks Advisory Solution Consultant is a technical & business consultant with the advanced ability to develop, position and provide industry and product specific solutions during sales cycles while achieving quarterly and annual sales goals for an assigned territory.
   

  

* Partner closely with ServiceNow Account Executives as the Moveworks product, AI, and domain expert, supporting complex sales cycles and driving deal strategy across one or more industries.
* Lead customer discovery sessions and workshops to understand business challenges, technical environments, and success criteria, aligning Moveworks capabilities to customer needs and outcomes.
* Deliver compelling, persona- and value-based product demonstrations that “explain by showing” how Moveworks and ServiceNow together automate work and improve employee experiences.
* Facilitate technical and architectural workshops covering Moveworks’ AI/ML approach, integrations, security, and platform architecture, in the context of the customer’s ServiceNow environment.
* Partner with Business Value Services to build data-driven business cases, prioritize use cases, and articulate measurable ROI using reports, calculators, and insights.
* Define customer success criteria and lead the design, execution, and management of end-to-end proof-of-concept engagements.
* Develop trusted relationships with customer stakeholders and client partners, guiding strategic programs such as roadmap alignment, customer journey mapping, and outcome planning in top accounts.
* Collaborate cross-functionally to ensure a smooth transition from pre-sales to post-sales by documenting requirements and facilitating a clean handoff to Customer Success teams.
* Provide continuous feedback to Product Management on customer needs, competitive insights, and market trends to help influence product direction and strategy.
* Stay current on competitive positioning and market differentiation, clearly articulating Moveworks’ value within the broader ServiceNow ecosystem.
* Contribute to team excellence by sharing best practices, reusable assets, and continuously improving demos, presentations, and sales processes to be more scalable and impactful.
* Support field and marketing initiatives, including executive briefings, conferences, user groups, and industry events.


**Qualifications**
**To be successful in this role you have:**
* Experience applying and evaluating AI in enterprise environments, including integrating AI into workflows, decision-making, and problem-solving through automation, AI-powered tools, and data-driven insights.
* Strong understanding of cloud architecture and RESTful APIs, with the ability to leverage self-service tools and configurators to demonstrate “art of the possible” solutions and connect to customer pre-production environments.
* Familiarity with RPA, iPaaS, and low-code/no-code platforms; scripting or coding experience is a plus for building prototypes, custom use cases, and integrations.
* 5+ years of experience in pre-sales solution consulting or sales engineering roles supporting enterprise application platforms.
* Experience in enterprise industries such as technology or telecommunications is preferred.
* Proficiency with the ServiceNow platform or deep technical experience with other enterprise cloud software solutions.
* Demonstrated ability to collaborate cross-functionally with product management, product marketing, partners, and professional services teams.
* Strong territory and pipeline management skills, with experience partnering closely with sales counterparts to drive consistent execution.
* Willingness to travel approximately 50% for customer meetings and internal events.
* Fluent in Swedish and English


 Additional Information
   

  

**Work Personas**
 We approach our distributed world of work with flexibility and trust. Work personas (flexible, remote, or required in office) are categories that are assigned to ServiceNow employees depending on the nature of their work and their assigned work location. Learn more here. To determine eligibility for a work persona, ServiceNow may confirm the distance between your primary residence and the closest ServiceNow office using a third-party service.
   

  

**Equal Opportunity Employer**
 ServiceNow is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, creed, religion, sex, sexual orientation, national origin or nationality, ancestry, age, disability, gender identity or expression, marital status, veteran status, or any other category protected by law. In addition, all qualified applicants with arrest or conviction records will be considered for employment in accordance with legal requirements.
   

  

**Accommodations**
 We strive to create an accessible and inclusive experience for all candidates. If you require a reasonable accommodation to complete any part of the application process, or are unable to use this online application and need an alternative method to apply, please contact globaltalentss@servicenow.com for assistance.
   

  

**Export Control Regulations**
 For positions requiring access to controlled technology subject to export control regulations, including the U.S. Export Administration Regulations (EAR), ServiceNow may be required to obtain export control approval from government authorities for certain individuals. All employment is contingent upon ServiceNow obtaining any export license or other approval that may be required by relevant export control authorities.
   

  

 From Fortune. ©2025 Fortune Media IP Limited. All rights reserved. Used under license.

title: Solution Architect - Graduate
description:
This role has been designed as ‘’Onsite’ with an expectation that you will primarily work from an HPE partner/customer office.
   

  

**Who We Are**
 Hewlett Packard Enterprise is the global edge-to-cloud company advancing the way people live and work. We help companies connect, protect, analyze, and act on their data and applications wherever they live, from edge to cloud, so they can turn insights into outcomes at the speed required to thrive in today’s complex world. Our culture thrives on finding new and better ways to accelerate what’s next. We know varied backgrounds are valued and succeed here. We have the flexibility to manage our work and personal needs. We make bold moves, together, and are a force for good. If you are looking to stretch and grow your career our culture will embrace you. Open up opportunities with HPE.
   

  

**Job Description**
**Office of the CTO (Sweden)**
**Location:** 
 Stockholm or Gothenburg (Hybrid)
 **Team:** 
 CTO Office
   

  

 The
 **Office of the CTO** 
 is the technical "think-tank" of our organization. Based in our
 **Stockholm** 
 or
 **Gothenburg** 
 hubs, you will join a high-impact team responsible for defining the technical vision that keeps us at the forefront of the Swedish technology landscape.
   

  

 In this role, you will act as a bridge between emerging local trends and our long-term technical strategy. You aren’t just following a roadmap—you are helping to identify the milestones that will define our success in Sweden for years to come.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Strategic Tech Scouting: Proactively analyze emerging technologies (e.g., AI, Sustainable Tech, Edge Computing) specifically within the Swedish innovation landscape to identify new opportunities.
* Innovation Insights: Distill complex technical developments into clear, high-level briefings for leadership, providing a "Sweden-first" perspective on our strategic direction.
* Ecosystem Engagement: Act as a technical ambassador to Swedish research institutes, universities, and industry partners, fostering the collaborations that drive local innovation.
* Executive Storytelling: Create compelling narratives and presentations that translate our technical vision for Swedish customers and internal stakeholders.
* Strategic Projects: Support the CTO leadership on high-priority initiatives that require a blend of technical curiosity and strategic thinking.


**Your Profile**
* Academic Background: Recently completed/graduated (graduation within the last 12 months) from a Bachelor’s or Master’s in Computer Science, Engineering Physics, Industrial Management, or a related field from a Swedish technical university.
* The "Strategic Generalist": You have a broad interest in how different technologies (Cloud, Security, Data) intersect to solve the unique challenges of the Swedish market.
* Analytical Mindset: You excel at taking "noisy" information and distilling it into clear, actionable insights for decision-makers.
* Communication: Exceptional English skills are required. Proficiency in Swedish is essential for engaging effectively with the local tech ecosystem and partners.
* Curiosity & Ambiguity: You thrive on the "fuzzy front end" of technology where the answers aren't always clear and the horizon is always moving.


**Why Join the CTO Office in Sweden?**
* Local Impact, Global Context: Gain a unique view of how a global tech leader operates, while staying deeply connected to the Swedish tech community.
* Direct Mentorship: Work closely with senior technical leaders and architects in our Swedish offices who are shaping the future of the industry.
* Collaborative Culture: Enjoy the flat hierarchy, transparency, and innovation-led environment of our Stockholm and Gothenburg teams.
* Career Launchpad: This role is a premier entry point for those aspiring to future leadership roles in technical strategy


**What We’d Prefer You Bring**
* The drive to seek out what’s next and to deliver exceptional results
* A collaborative, solution focused spirit and overall sense of urgency
* The desire to embrace new ideas and fresh thinking and seek out ideas different than your own
* Experience as an active leader on campus who strives to make a positive impact on the world
* Comfort with working in a hybrid (virtual and face-to-face) environment
* Exceptional communication and presentation skills and the ability to ask smart questions


**What You Can Expect From Us**
* Initial extensive onboarding to support you with adjusting into the role
* Ongoing learning and development throughout the duration of the program
* Be mentored by at least one senior member of the team and after two years in the program you can grow into a true professional with valuable relationships and international working experience
* Competitive salary and great benefits

**At HPE, We’re**

**Want to learn more about Digital Sales careers at HPE?**
 Try our new virtual experience program, where you can explore what’s next for you in this role and earn shareable completion certificates that stand out to HPE recruiters and hiring managers. https://careers.hpe.com/us/en/students-virtual-experiences
   

  

**Additional Skills**
 Accountability, Accountability, Action Planning, Active Learning, Active Listening, Bias, Business, Calendar Management, Coaching, Computer Literacy, Creativity, Critical Thinking, Design Thinking, Empathy, Follow-Through, Group Problem Solving, Growth Mindset, Intellectual Curiosity (Inactive), Long Term Planning, Managing Ambiguity, Office Administration, Policy and procedures, Recordkeeping, Risk Assessment, Software Development {+ 5 more}
   

  

**What We Can Offer You**

 We strive to provide our team members and their loved ones with a comprehensive suite of benefits that supports their physical, financial and emotional wellbeing.
   

  

**Personal & Professional Development**
 We also invest in your career because the better you are, the better we all are. We have specific programs catered to helping you reach any career goals you have — whether you want to become a knowledge expert in your field or apply your skills to another division.

title: System Architect – Infrastructure & Tooling Team Lead
description:
**ABOUT THE COMPANY** 




 A specialist in identity, secure transactions, and digital services, IN Groupe is the global leader in secure identity and trust services. Every day, our 4,000 employees across 40 countries work to ensure that everyone has access to a reliable and secure identity, both in the physical and digital worlds. With our solutions and our international network of 10 R&D centers, we support governments and businesses in more than 130 countries.
 



 Joining IN Groupe means helping to shape the future of the identity and secure transaction market. Become part of our international teams — driven by innovation and proud to design solutions that make life easier and protect personal data for millions of people around the world.
 



  





**ABOUT THE ROLE** 




 As
 **System Architect,** 
 you will act as the technical lead for the
 **Infrastructure & Tooling** 
 team in day-to-day operational matters while also owning the architectural direction of our SaaS service platforms.
 



 You will work at the intersection of
 **operations and architecture** 
 — ensuring stability and performance today, while designing scalable, secure, and automated platforms for tomorrow.
 



 This role requires deep
 **technical expertise,** 
 strong
 **leadership capabilities,** 
 and the ability to balance operational excellence with long-term architectural thinking.
 



  





**MAIN RESPONSABILITIES** 




 · Act as
 **team lead** 
 for operational, day-to-day infrastructure topics and staffing related tasks.
 



 · Define and evolve the architecture of our
 **SaaS service platforms based on the IT OPS guidelines** 




 · Drive infrastructure automation and Infrastructure-as-Code initiatives
 



 · Ensure high availability, scalability, and security across our platforms
 



 · Design and maintain
 **Linux-based environments** 
 (primarily RHEL-based distributions)
 



 · Collaborate with development, security, and product teams to align platform capabilities with business needs
 



 · Contribute to continuous improvement of operational processes, reliability, and resilience
 



 · Support strategic decisions regarding infrastructure technologies and roadmap
 



  





**ABOUT YOU** 



* Very strong proficiency in
 **Ansible and Terraform**
* Solid experience with OpenStack (or similar private cloud platforms)
* Advanced knowledge of Linux environments (RHEL-based)
* Strong understanding of:



 -Server infrastructure
 



 -Storage solutions
 



 -Networking
 



 -Hardware Security Modules (HSMs)
 


* Experience designing and operating production-grade SaaS infrastructure
* Prior experience managing a team
* Comfortable working in security-sensitive and compliance-driven environments
* Professional proficiency in
 **Swedish and English**



  





**Nice-to-Have** 



* Experience from regulated industries (eID, PKI, digital identity, financial services, public sector)
* Experience with high-availability architectures and geo-redundant designs
* Experience leading or mentoring other engineers



  





**Personal Qualities** 



* A natural technical leader who enjoys guiding others in operational excellence
* Structured and analytical, with strong problem-solving skills
* Comfortable taking ownership of both daily operations and long-term strategy
* Passionate about automation, security, and resilient system design
* A team player who communicates clearly and collaborates across functions



  





**Background check** 




 Transparency, security, and trust are the core of our company; therefore, the final candidate will be subjected to a background check as a mandatory step in the recruitment process.

title: Senior Linux System Administrator
description:
We are a $13+ billion global technology company, home to more than 224,000 people across 60 countries, delivering industry-leading capabilities centered around digital, engineering, cloud, and AI, powered by a broad portfolio of technology services and products.
 



  





 HCLTech is a globally recognized leader in the Tech and IT industry, but we’ve never forgotten the startup mindset that got us here. We’ve always approached our work with an idea-first attitude because every one of our accomplishments —no matter how big or small —can be traced back to an idea’s single spark.
 



  





 It’s that spark —that inner drive —that sets our people apart from our competitors. It enables us not just to pull off game-changing feat after game-changing feat but to better our world in the process. We want you to find your spark. Because that’s what drives you to be better, be more and ultimately, be more fulfilled.
 



  





**Role- Infrastructure Engineer** 




**Title-** 
 Linux System Administrator
 



**Location-** 
 Södertälje, Sweden
 



**Job Type-** 
 Hybrid
 



**Employment type** 
 - Full Time Employment
 



  





**Job Description:** 




  





 Experienced Linux System Administrator Remote Desktop Infrastructure
 



 Assignment:
 



 We are seeking an experienced Linux System Administrator with strong focus on automation, architecture, and platform engineering to design, build, and maintain our Remote Desktop (VDI) environment. This infrastructure supports GPU‑accelerated remote desktops for pre‑ and post‑processing of HPC workloads, including automotive simulations, visualization, and rendering. The platform runs Rocky Linux / RHEL, uses X11 and Xfce4, and leverages NICE DCV, EF Portal (EnginFrame), and SLURM to deliver high‑performance graphical sessions remotely.
 



 Key Responsibilities
 



 Design, deploy, and maintain a Linux‑based GPU‑enabled Remote Desktop environment (DCV, EnginFrame, SLURM, X11, Xfce4 on Rocky Linux).
 



 Develop automation and Infrastructure‑as‑Code (primarily using Ansible) to ensure consistent and repeatable deployments.
 



 Ensure security, scalability, performance, and long‑term maintainability of the platform.
 



 Collaborate closely with HPC and infrastructure engineering teams.
 



 Document architecture, configurations, deployment workflows, and operational procedures.
 



 Required Competencies
 



 Solid experience as a Linux System Administrator, ideally on Rocky Linux or RHEL.
 



 Strong automation and IaC skills (Ansible or similar tools).
 



 Proficiency in scripting, primarily Bash; Python is a plus.
 



 Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and version control (Git, GitLab).
 



 Understanding of X11, desktop environments (Xfce4, GNOME) and remote rendering/display protocols.
 



 Good knowledge of networking, security, and monitoring tools (Prometheus‑based observability preferred).
 



 Architectural thinking with ability to design scalable and maintainable systems.
 



 Ability to work independently and take ownership of complex environments.
 



 Nice to Have
 



 Experience with HPC environments and SLURM workload manager.
 



 Experience with NICE DCV, EnginFrame (EF Portal), Open OnDemand, or similar remote visualization platforms.
 



 Familiarity with container technologies (Docker, Podman) and monitoring/observability tooling.
 



  





**Benefits** 



* A supportive, diverse and global team with a brilliant culture.
* Great opportunities to make the role your own, upskill yourself and get involved with exciting projects.
* Total Wellbeing is our focus. Alongside your professional excellence, you join the likeminded colleagues to create a larger impact within the company and society at large in your chosen area of passion - CSR Council, Diversity Council, Women Connect, Sparks – Engagement Champion to name a few.
* To know more about us visit –
 
 www.hcltech.com
* For more information on how we process your personal data, please refer to HCLTech’s
 **Candidate Data Privacy Notice.**

title: Machine Learning engineer
description:
At Viaplay Group, we entertain millions of people every day through our streaming services, radio networks, and TV channels. We believe in the power of content not just as a way of telling stories and touching lives, but also expanding worlds.
   

  

 We’re looking for the best people to join us on our journey. Right now, we’re searching for a
 **Machine Learning Engineer** 
 in our
 **Stockholm** 
 office – are you ready to hit play on an exciting career change?
   

  

**The Role**
 As a Machine Learning Engineer at Viaplay, you will play a pivotal role in shaping the next generation of our data-driven products and services. Working at the intersection of personalization, customer engagement, and operational intelligence, you’ll design and deploy state-of-the-art ML systems that directly impact millions of users across our platform.
   

  

 Your responsibilities will extend far beyond model development. You’ll act as a strategic partner to product, engineering, and commercial teams, translating business objectives into scalable, high-impact ML solutions. Whether enhancing our recommendation engines, uncovering deep user insights, or enabling smarter decision-making across the organization, your work will be central to Viaplay’s continued growth and innovation.
   

  

 You’ll join a high-performing, inclusive, and curious team of ML Engineers, Data Scientists, Analysts, and Data Engineers. Together, we foster a culture of experimentation, shared ownership, and technical excellence. Our recommender system already powers engaging user experiences, and we’re only at the beginning of our machine learning journey.
   

  

**What You’ll Be Doing**
* Design, develop, and deploy scalable machine learning models for recommendation, prediction, and classification use cases.
* Own and lead end-to-end ML initiatives, from ideation and stakeholder alignment to development, deployment, and ongoing performance evaluation.
* Translate business needs into structured ML problems and deliver measurable, impactful outcomes.
* Build robust, production-ready pipelines and monitor ML systems in a cloud-native environment.
* Conduct advanced statistical analyses to uncover trends in user behavior, content performance, and platform engagement.
* Collaborate closely with product, engineering, content, commercial, and marketing teams to drive data-informed decision-making.
* Contribute to a culture of experimentation, innovation, and continuous learning within the data team.


**What We’re Looking For**
 We're seeking someone who combines technical depth with strategic thinking and a curious, problem-solving mindset.
   

  

 We understand you may feel confident ticking certain boxes more than others and that’s why we always keep an open mind in our recruitment process. But, in order to thrive in this role, we do believe you’ll have at least some experience in the following:
   

  

* Proven experience leading ML projects end-to-end, from problem definition and stakeholder alignment to deployment and monitoring in production.
* Expertise in one or more ML domains such as LLMs, NLP, recommendation systems, or reinforcement learning.
* Ability to build ML solutions that are scalable, robust, and explainable, not just performant in isolation.
* Strong experience deploying ML models in cloud environments (preferably AWS) and using containerization tools like Docker .
* Familiarity with orchestration tools such as Airflow for reliable ML pipeline execution and monitoring
* Solid software engineering fundamentals.
* 5+ years of hands-on experience in applied Machine Learning within production environments.
* Strong academic background in Statistics, Mathematics, Computer Science, or a related quantitative field.


**It’s a bonus if you have:** 
  

  

* Experience with recommender systems, personalization, or content optimization — ideally in media, streaming, or e-commerce.
* Familiarity with MLOps practices, including CI/CD for ML, model monitoring, and production observability.
* Exposure to real-time or near-real-time ML architectures and streaming data systems.


 What we offer you
   

  

* We’ve got you covered! 30 days of paid vacation every year, an attractive pension and insurance scheme, and generous parental leave pay lift.
* Your wellbeing matters. We provide you with various wellbeing initiatives including wellness allowance.
* Flexibility that works. We follow a hybrid model with at least three days a week in the office, giving you the best mix of collaboration and focus time.
* A safe space to grow and up-skill. Our learning culture puts you in the driver’s seat of your own development.
* An innovative environment with Hack Days once a year. This week-long initiative allows you to think outside the box and deliver creative, technical solutions that (more often than not) go on to be implemented, either in our product or our ways of working.
* Entertainment is what we love, and entertainment is what we do. So, unlimited access to Viaplay seems only fair for you to get to know the product – including serier & viewing events, new release movie rentals, linear channels and more.


**Hit play today**
 If this feels like your kind of challenge, make sure you apply by attaching your CV here – you may also want to add your LinkedIn profile. Please don’t send us your application via email because we won’t be able to accept it. We do, however, welcome any questions you may have about this particular position.
   

  

 Want to learn more about who we are and what we do? Check out our careers page or follow us on Instagram! We’re only ever a few clicks away.

title: Business Development Representative - Central and Eastern Europe
description:
**Grow your career in SaaS sales as our new Business Development Representative in Stockholm!** 




  





 At Pexip, we’re a small, globally diverse team spread across countries, united by a passion to
 



 empower secure, seamless video collaboration for everyone. Guided by our winning mindset to always think like world champions, we partner with leading industry players to make a big impact on a global scale. If joining a talented, close-knit, and customer-obsessed team on a mission that truly matters is important to you, we hope you keep reading.
 



  





 Are you looking for an opportunity to grow your career in an environment that values collaboration, learning, and impact? Pexip is seeking a motivated
 **Business Development Representative (BDR)** 
 to join our team in Stockholm, focusing on the
 **Central and Eastern Europe** 
 . This role is ideal for someone eager to develop a long-term career in SaaS sales while working alongside experienced professionals in an innovative and fast-growing company.
 



  





**About the team:** 




 You’ll be part of a small, collaborative, and solution-oriented team based in Stockholm. We work closely with teams across sales, product, and operations, and we value trust, transparency, and teamwork.
 



 The role reports to: Business Development Manager
 



  





**What you’ll be doing:** 



* Identifying and engaging potential customers through outreach, including social selling, email, LinkedIn, and phone conversations.
* Understanding customer challenges and positioning Pexip as a solution that makes a difference.
* Qualifying leads and scheduling high-value meetings for Account Executives.
* Collaborating with internal teams to refine messaging, improve outreach strategies, and share insights.
* Tracking and optimizing outreach efforts using CRM tools like Salesforce to meet and exceed goals.



  





**What you’ll bring:** 




 We’re seeking someone who enjoys building relationships, solving challenges, and learning new skills. Our ideal candidate has:
 


* Experience in sales, business development, or customer-facing roles is a plus, however, we’re even more interested in your curiosity, problem-solving mindset, and willingness to learn.
* Strong communication skills, with the ability to engage stakeholders and create meaningful connections.
* Comfortable working in a fast-moving environment with a collaborative team approach.
* Familiarity with CRM tools and prospecting techniques is a bonus but not required.
* Bachelor’s degree
* Fluency in Polish and English (other Nordic languages are a plus).



  





**What we offer:** 



* Career development: Clear progression paths into enterprise sales and business development.
* Continuous learning: World-class training and mentorship from top SaaS professionals.
* Flexible work environment: A hybrid setup that supports work-life balance.
* A people-first culture: We value personal and professional growth, foster an inclusive environment, and prioritize wellness.



  





**In Pexip we strive to:** 



* Put people and culture first in everything we do.
* Care about our health and take employee wellness seriously
* Promote a flat organization and embrace freedom and responsibility, aligned to accountability and performance goals.
* Proudly play the role of a technology enabler in the innovation ecosystem of our industry and have a fantastic team of incredibly talented people working here. You will work with them on disruptive and ambitious projects that move our industry forward.
* Build a resilient, inclusive and learning culture. We promote openness where people can grow, thrive, and succeed at work.



  





 At Pexip, we believe that a great workplace is built on trust, collaboration, and a shared commitment to excellence. If you’re looking for a role where you can grow, make an impact, and work with a team that values your contributions, we’d love to hear from you.
 



  





**Apply today and let’s build something great together!** 




  





**About Pexip:** 




 Pexip is a video technology specialist, providing all organizations with seamless communication regardless of technology platforms and security requirements–powering the critical conversations that people rely on every day.
 



  





 Our company values are at the core of everything we do, and they define how we interact with each other, our customers and our partners daily. They guide our business, our product development, and our brand. As our company continues to evolve and grow, scaling the Pexip Way is critical to our success. Since day one, Pexip has had an open and inclusive work culture with equal opportunities for all. We are proud to represent a diverse workforce, and we see diversity as a competitive advantage.
 



  





 Pexip is an equal opportunity employer and evaluates applicants regardless of an individual’s age, race, color, gender, religion, national origin, sexual orientation, disability, or veteran status. We celebrate diversity and are committed to creating an inclusive environment for all employees. Diversity and culture are what make Pexip so unique.
 



  





 Pexip has HQ in Oslo, Norway, with main offices in; London - UK, Herndon - US, Stockholm - Sweden, Paris - France and Sydney - Australia, as well as sales offices across the globe.
 



  





**Consent to Data Retention** 




 As part of our recruitment process, we may retain your personal data, including your resume and application details, for up to one year after the conclusion of your application. This allows us to consider you for future opportunities that align with your skills and interests. By submitting your application, you acknowledge and consent to this retention period. Please note that your data will be handled securely and in accordance with applicable privacy regulations. If at any time you wish to withdraw this consent or request deletion of your information, you may contact us directly.

title: Data Engineer
description:
At
 **0TO9** 
 , we don’t just build companies; we build data-driven machines. As a Venture Builder, our success depends on how we capture, process, and leverage insights across our entire portfolio. We are looking for a Data Engineer who wants to move away from maintaining legacy systems and instead start from "Zero" to build scalable, modern data architectures.
 



  





**The Role: Engineering the Flow** 




 You won't just be "managing databases." You will be the architect of our data infrastructure, ensuring that every venture we launch has a world-class foundation for analytics, AI, and operational efficiency.
 



  





**What you’ll actually do:** 



* Develop and maintain scalable data pipelines (ETL/ELT) that integrate diverse sources from our fintech ecosystem.
* Work with modern cloud stacks (AWS/GCP/Azure) to ensure our data environment is reproducible, secure, and fast.
* Work closely with CTOs of our portfolio companies to solve complex data challenges from day one.
* Ensure our data warehouse (Snowflake/BigQuery/Redshift) is optimized for both real-time insights and long-term analytics.



  





**Your Tech Stack & Mindset** 




 We value clean code, automated workflows, and a "builder" mentality.
 


* Pro-level Python or Scala, and you speak SQL like a native language.
* Experience with orchestration (Airflow/Prefect), dbt, and modern streaming (Kafka/Flink) is a huge plus.
* Deep understanding of cloud infrastructure and containerization (Docker/Kubernetes).
* You don't just fix bugs; you build systems that prevent them. You understand that "done" means documented and automated.



  





**Why 0TO9?** 



* See your code impact multiple startups simultaneously. No corporate red tape.
* You get a seat at the table to decide which tools and frameworks we use.
* Join a truly international team with hubs in Stockholm, Berlin, and Warsaw.
* We are builders. We provide the environment for you to grow as we scale.

title: Azure Data & AI Engineer
description:
**Sammanfattning**
 Vill du arbeta med modern data engineering och avancerad analys för att hjälpa organisationer fatta bättre och mer datadrivna beslut? Hos Avanade får du möjlighet att arbeta med moderna dataplattformar i Azure och leverera lösningar som gör verklig affärsnytta för våra kunder!
   

  

 Du blir en del av ett starkt community av Azure Data- och AI-specialister där kunskapsdelning, samarbete och mentorskap är en självklar del av kulturen. Vi investerar aktivt i din utveckling och ger dig möjlighet att arbeta med varierande kundprojekt, modern teknik och några av branschens mest spännande datalösningar.
   

  

 Här får du både utvecklas tekniskt och växa i din konsultroll samtidigt som du är med och formar framtiden inom AI, analys och datadriven innovation.
   

  

**Om rollen**
 Som
 **Azure Data & AI Engineer på Avanade** 
 arbetar du nära våra kunder för att omvandla affärsbehov till hållbara tekniska lösningar. Du analyserar nuvarande arbetssätt, identifierar möjligheter där data kan skapa värde och är med och designar moderna dataplattformar i Azure.
   

  

 Du kommer att arbeta med utveckling av datapipelines, API:er och datalager samt bidra till att göra data tillgänglig och användbar för verksamheten genom analys och visualisering. I rollen samarbetar du tätt med både kollegor och kunder i olika projekt, vilket ger dig möjlighet att bredda din erfarenhet och utvecklas i din karriär som konsult. Hos oss arbetar du i en kultur där vi stöttar varandra, delar kunskap och utvecklas tillsammans
   

  

**Together We Do What Matters.**
**Arbetsuppgifter**
**I Rollen Kommer Du Bland Annat Att**
* Designa och utveckla moderna, datadrivna lösningar i Azure för våra kunder.
* Arbeta nära kunder för att förstå deras behov och omvandla dem till tekniska lösningar som skapar affärsvärde.
* Fördjupa din kompetens inom datamodellering, ETL och orkestrering av dataplattformar.
* Utveckla och hantera dataflöden med verktyg som SQL, Python, Azure Data Factory och Airflow.
* Delta i hela leveransprocessen – från krav och design till implementation och uppföljning.
* Ta ansvar för din egen kompetensutveckling och samarbeta med både tekniska specialister och affärsroller i teamet.


**Qualifications**
**Kompetenser och erfarenheter**
* God förståelse för data och dess roll i organisationer, både inom enterprise- och mid-market-segmentet.
* Erfarenhet av programmering i SQL och Python, alternativt relevant utbildning med fokus på analytiskt tänkande och problemlösning.
* Erfarenhet av Azure Data Factory (ADF) och Airflow.
* Kunskap om Azure Data Factory, Azure Data Lake, Azure SQL Data Warehouse och Azure SQL.
* Grundläggande kunskap inom och ett genuint intresse för Data Science och Machine Learning.
* Erfarenhet av nära samarbete i team och av att arbeta i distribuerade eller internationella team.
* Du har mycket god kommunikativ förmåga och kan samarbeta med kunder och kollegor på både svenska och engelska, i tal och skrift.
* Erfarenhet av andra programmeringsspråk eller mjukvaruutveckling är meriterande.


**Om Dig**
* Du är analytisk och nyfiken – och drivs av att ställa frågor som “varför?” och “vad händer om?”.
* Du är en lagspelare som trivs i samarbeten över olika roller och kompetensområden.
* Du brinner för att lösa verkliga problem med hjälp av data och för att ständigt utvecklas och lära dig nytt.
* Du är anpassningsbar och trivs i dynamiska projektmiljöer där förutsättningarna kan förändras.
* Du är nyfiken på innovation, molnteknologi och framtiden inom AI.

title: Senior Nätverkskonsult / Arkitekt
description:
Vi tror att de bästa idéerna föds i ett team som har kul tillsammans. Vill du vara med och skapa lösningar som gör skillnad för kunder – och samhället i stort? Då vill jag lära känna dig!
   

  

 Jag heter
 **Solveig Jagelid** 
 och jag ansvarar för vårt fantastiska konsultteam
 **Networking & Hybrid IT i region Öst.** 
 Jag söker dig som vill arbeta i rollen som Nätverkskonsult / Arkitekt och vara med på en spännande IT-resa tillsammans med våra kunder. Har du erfarenhet av Cisco, Aruba och/eller Fortinet och vill utvecklas tillsammans med ett kompetent och familjärt gäng av konsulter? Då tror jag att du kommer att trivas hos oss på Telia Cygate.
   

  

**Vad du kommer att göra i rollen:**
 Som Nätverkskonsult/arkitekt får du utmana dig själv genom att jobba med det senaste inom design av olika nätverks- och säkerhetslösningar till installation, konfiguration, automation och felsökning i våra riktigt stora kunders IT-miljöer. Våra kund- och leveransprojekt spänner ofta över flera tjänsteområden vilket innebär att du kommer få arbeta tillsammans med andra specialister inom våra tre fokusområden, nätverk, säkerhet och hybrid IT. Du hjälper kunden att hitta den mest optimala lösningen för dem samtidigt som du får en djupare insikt och ny inspiration i allt från Cloud, Security, Automation, On-prem, och de senaste kombinationerna där emellan. Vad kan vara roligare än det? I takt med att du utvecklas så ser vi gärna att du certifierar dig så att du får bevis på dina framgångar.
   

  

 Vidare kommer du att:
   

  

* Designa och implementera moderna nätverks- och säkerhetslösningar som stödjer samhällsviktiga funktioner.
* Arbeta med Cisco, Aruba och Fortinet i avancerade miljöer.
* Bidra till automation, hybrid IT och molnlösningar som driver digital transformation.
* Vara rådgivare och partner till våra kunder – från idé till färdig lösning.


**För att lyckas i rollen:**
 Som person gillar du utmaningar, att skapa förändring och har en förmåga att engagera kunder såväl som dina kollegor. Du kommer särskilt till din rätt när du får ge utlopp för tankar och idéer där du använder din förståelse för att omsätta krav till genomförbara lösningar. Förutom det får du tillhöra en växande organisation som stöttar dig på din egen utvecklingsresa; varför inte certifiera dig med oss och utforska det senaste hos våra leverantörer.
   

  

* Tidigare erfarenhet inom Nätverksinfrastruktur inom Cisco, Aruba och/eller Fortinet.
* Certifiering inom Cisco, Aruba och/eller Fortinet ses som starkt meriterande.
* Goda kunskaper inom Routing och Switching.
* Flytande i svenska och engelska, både i tal och skrift.


**Varför Telia Cygate?**
 På Telia Cygate är vi inte bara experter på nätverk, säkerhet och olika slags moln – vi är också ett gäng som tycker att det ska vara kul att gå till jobbet! Som en del av Telia Company har vi styrkan att skapa verklig påverkan i stor skala, bidra till samhällsnytta och hjälpa våra kunder att navigera i digitaliseringens värld. Vi gör det alltid med värme, omtanke och ett leende. Här är det idéerna och våra olika perspektiv som gör oss starka, och tillsammans ser vi till att teknikens värld blir en plats där alla trivs – och där du hör hemma.
   

  

 Hos oss är din utveckling viktig. Vi uppmuntrar till kontinuerlig kompetensutveckling och ser till att just du och dina intressen är i fokus. Vi vet att det är människorna som utgör vårt företag, och därför värdesätter vi glädje, kreativitet och olika perspektiv i allt vi gör.
   

  

 Välkommen att växa tillsammans med oss, där vi gör teknik mänsklig och skapar verklig påverkan!
   

  

**Vad vi erbjuder**
 När du börjar hos oss får du en fantastisk möjlighet att utvecklas, omfattande förmånspaket, möjlighet till hybridarbete och mer. Du har också chans att få bonus baserat på din prestation och Telia Cygates resultat.
   

  

**Låter det intressant?**
 Vi ser fram emot din ansökan senast
 **2026-04-26.** 
 Rollen kan komma att stängas tidigare om vi hittar rätt kandidat – så vänta inte för länge!
   

  

**Placeringsort:** 
 Solna, Stockholm
   

  

 Om du går vidare i processen kommer du att kontaktas av vår
 **Talent Acquisition Partner** 
 . Bakgrund- och referenskontroller ingår i processen.
   

  

 Vill du veta mer om rollen? Kontakta gärna Solveig Jagelid på solveig.jagelid@cygate.se
   

  

**Lika möjligheter för alla**
 På Telia värderar vi kompetens och utvecklingspotential. Vi främjar mångfald och ser till att varje individs behov tillgodoses, oavsett funktionsvariation, kön, ålder, nationalitet, sexuell läggning eller social bakgrund. Tillsammans skapar vi en inkluderande arbetsmiljö där din unikhet är vår styrka
   

  

**Välkommen till Telia Cygate – Home of Experts**

title: Cyber Security Architect
description:
*Vill du vara med och forma framtidens IT-säkerhet i en av Sveriges ledande bankkoncerner? Som Cyber Security Architect inom LF Bank blir du en samhällsviktig spelare som säkerställer att banken har en trygg IT-miljö för både kunder och kollegor*
***Om rollen***
 Som Cyber Security Architect ansvarar du för att utveckla och genomföra bankens målarkitektur inom IT-säkerhet. Du blir en del av ett kompetent och engagerat team som värdesätter samarbete, utveckling och säkerhet. Du samarbetar brett inom banken och koncernen, förhindrar säkerhetsincidenter och implementerar effektiva styrmodeller. Du tar fram och inför styrande dokument, processer och rutiner tillsammans med kollegor inom informationssäkerhet och IT.
   

  

 Dina arbetsuppgifter kommer vara bland annat:
   

  

* Ge arkitekturstöd och leda operativt arbete inom säkerhet
* Dokumentera och implementera riktlinjer, processer och ramverk
* Identifiera och hantera säkerhetsrisker i projekt och system
* Ge tekniskt stöd och rådgivning kring säkerhetslösningar
* Delta i samarbeten och utbildningar för att stärka säkerhetskulturen
* Omvärldsbevaka och föreslå förbättringar inom IT-säkerhet


*Följande kommer göra dig framgångsrik i denna tjänst:*
* Gedigen erfarenhet av IT-säkerhet i komplexa miljöer
* Erfarenhet som arkitekt eller i senior teknisk roll
* Erfarenhet av molnplattformar och säkerhetsarkitektur i molnet
* God teknisk förståelse inom IT-infrastruktur och utveckling
* Erfarenhet av agil metodik och CI/CD
* Certifiering inom arkitektur (t.ex. SABSA, TOGAF)
* Kännedom om bankregelverk (DORA, GDPR, PCI-DSS)


*Personliga egenskaper*
 Som person är du en analytisk lagspelare med starkt driv och passion för IT-säkerhet, där ”Security by Design” är en självklarhet. Du är självgående, strukturerad och lösningsfokuserad, med en tydlig förmåga att arbeta målinriktat. Din kommunikativa förmåga gör att du enkelt etablerar och underhåller ett brett kontaktnät i komplexa organisationer, och du bidrar till en positiv och trivsam arbetsmiljö.
   

  

**Kontaktuppgifter:**
 Rekryterande chef: jonny.knutas@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Forena: jessica.loow@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Facklig representant Akademikerföreningen: christina.berg@lansforsakringar.se
   

  

 Låter det spännande? Då vill vi veta mer om dig! Välkommen med din ansökan redan idag. Vi arbetar löpande med denna rekrytering och kan komma att tillsätta tjänsten innan sista ansökningsdag.
   

  

 Länsförsäkringar AB är en inkluderande arbetsplats där mod, möjligheter och engagemang står i centrum. Vi erbjuder ett hållbart arbetsliv med flexibla villkor och satsar på att alla medarbetare ska kunna växa och trivas, oavsett bakgrund.
   

  

 Länsförsäkringar Bank är en av Sveriges största och mest omtyckta banker, med ett brett utbud av tjänster inom betalningar, sparande, bolån och fonder. I arbetet mot vår vision "Tillsammans skapar vi trygghet och möjligheter" hoppas vi att du vill bidra med ditt engagemang och nyfikenhet för effektivisering, AI samt omvärldsspaning av moderna verktyg och metoder för att driva vår utveckling framåt.

title: Senior Data Engineer | AI & Data | Saab
description:
*Vill du bygga nästa generations dataplattform med senaste teknikerna, där målet är att skala både affärsvärde och robusthet i system som bidrar till samhällets säkerhet? Vill du ha en nyckelroll där data och AI inte bara är buzzwords, utan långsiktiga satsningsområden med verklig tyngd? Då kan detta vara rätt nästa steg för dig - skicka in din ansökan redan idag!* 




  





**Din roll** 




 På Saab pågår just nu en stor satsning på AI och Data. AI är en viktig del, men utan en välbyggd, skalbar och tillförlitlig dataförmåga stannar utvecklingen. Som
 **Senior Data Engineer** 
 i AI & Data bygger du grunden som gör datadrivna beslut, effektiva interna arbetsflöden och nästa generations produkter möjliga.
 



  





 Rollen är operativ och hands-on, men med ett tydligt inslag av tekniskt ledarskap. Du designar, bygger och vidareutvecklar datalösningar som används i produktion, och du är den som säkerställer att arkitekturbeslut, mönster och tekniska val håller över tid. Du arbetar nära dataflöden, pipelines, databaser och molnbaserade miljöer, och bidrar till att höja nivån på hela dataekosystemet.
 



  





 Du samarbetar tätt med andra Data Engineers, AI-ingenjörer och plattformsteam, och tar en aktiv roll i att utveckla tekniska arbetssätt, gemensamma standarder och arkitekturer. Du förväntas också vara en kunskapskälla och mentor för kollegor som är tidigare i sin karriär - någon som lyfter teamet genom att dela erfarenhet, driva tekniska diskussioner och bidra till att bygga en stark teknisk kultur.
 



  





**Din profil** 




 Vi söker dig som har flera års erfarenhet av data engineering i produktionsmiljöer och som är van att ta ägande över tekniska lösningar från design till drift. Du är trygg i din tekniska grund, har ett starkt systemtänk och är bekväm med att fatta och motivera tekniska beslut som påverkar hela plattformen.
 



  





 Du har god erfarenhet av molnplattformar som AWS och Azure, och har arbetat med moderna datamiljöer där skalbarhet, datakvalitet och automation är centralt. Du har sannolikt arbetat med orkestrering av dataflöden, har förståelse för principer som Data Mesh, Data Products och semantisk modellering, och ser hur dessa mönster kan tillämpas i praktiken för att skapa verkligt värde.
 



  





 Rollen passar dig som vill vara med och sätta riktningen för hur data hanteras och används i en av Sveriges mest tekniskt ambitiösa organisationer, och som trivs bäst när du får kombinera operativt arbete med strategisk påverkan. Rollen har sin primära utgångspunkt i Stockholm eller Göteborg, där huvuddelen av teamen och den tekniska miljön finns.
 



  





**Kvalifikationer:** 




  




* Kandidatexamen inom datateknik, IT, systemutveckling eller motsvarande
* Flera års erfarenhet av data engineering i produktionsmiljöer
* Stark erfarenhet av programmering i Python, SQL och/eller Scala
* Erfarenhet av molnplattformar (AWS, Azure) och modern datainfrastruktur
* Erfarenhet av att designa och bygga datapipelines, ETL/ELT-flöden och datamodeller
* Erfarenhet av Linux-baserade utvecklingsmiljöer
* God kommunikativ förmåga på svenska och engelska



  





**Meriterande:** 




  




* Erfarenhet av orkestrering och workflow-verktyg som Airflow, Dagster eller liknande
* Förståelse för Data Mesh, Data Products, semantisk modellering och datakatalogisering
* Erfarenhet av IaC-verktyg (Terraform, Pulumi) och CI/CD för datalösningar



  





 Denna position kräver att du blir godkänd i en säkerhetsprövning i enlighet med den svenska säkerhetsskyddslagen.
 



  





**Vad du blir en del av** 




**Common Tech** 
 har i uppdrag att skapa gemensamma tekniska förutsättningar för hela Saab. Genom att utveckla och förvalta gemensamma plattformar, tekniska ramverk och arbetssätt möjliggör Common Tech ett effektivt, enhetligt och långsiktigt teknikutvecklingsarbete över hela organisationen. Målet är att ge Saabs team rätt tekniska grund för att kunna utveckla avancerade produkter med hög kvalitet, säkerhet och tillförlitlighet.
 



  





**AI & Data** 
 är en av flera avdelningar inom Common Tech och ansvarar för att bygga och vidareutveckla Saabs gemensamma förmåga inom data, analys och artificiell intelligens. Här skapas plattformar, verktyg och tekniska lösningar som möjliggör storskalig datahantering, avancerad analys och användning av AI i verksamhetskritiska miljöer. Fokus ligger på att bygga robusta, skalbara och återanvändbara AI- och datakapabiliteter som kan användas brett över flera produkter, system och affärsområden.
 



  





 Inom AI & Data kombineras djup teknisk kompetens med ett långsiktigt och strategiskt perspektiv. Arbetet handlar inte om enskilda applikationer, utan om att skapa gemensamma tekniska förutsättningar - från dataplattformar och AI-infrastruktur till modeller, pipelines och arbetssätt - som andra team kan lita på och bygga vidare på.
 



  





**Saab** 
 är ett ledande försvars- och säkerhetsföretag med ett tydligt uppdrag: att bidra till att skydda människor och samhällen. Med omkring 20 000 medarbetare världen över utvecklar Saab avancerad teknik i nära samarbete mellan människor, kompetenser och discipliner. Företaget präglas av en inkluderande kultur där samarbete, lärande och långsiktig utveckling står i centrum.
 



  





*Dessa positioner kräver godkänd säkerhetsprövning enligt den svenska säkerhetsskyddslagen.* 




  





**Ansökan** 




 Den här rekryteringsprocessen hanteras av Jefferson Wells för SAABS räkning, vilket innebär att du kommer att bli anställd direkt av SAAB.
 



  





 Vi tar ej emot ansökningar via email pga GDPR.
 



  





**Urval och intervjuer sker löpande. Varmt välkommen med din ansökan!**

title: Lead Security Engineer – Core Technology Team
description:
**Tech Innovation at Apotea**
 Apotea is Sweden’s largest online pharmacy, committed to making healthcare products accessible and efficient for everyone. Our Tech department aims to redefine how AI and automation drive modern businesses — not by forcing AI into traditional workflows, but by creating AI-driven systems that give humans control, insight, and the ability to apply their expertise where it matters most.
   

  

 The Core Technology team builds the architectural foundation supporting e-commerce, logistics, data, AI/ML, and customer experience. We ensure all development aligns with our long-term vision and contributes to Apotea’s growth.
   

  

 We are now looking for a Lead Security Engineer to take full ownership of Apotea’s security strategy, ensure compliance, and enable teams to build and innovate securely at scale.
   

  

**The Role**
 As Lead Security Engineer, you will define, implement, and evolve security practices across AWS (serverless-first), e-commerce, logistics, and data platforms. The role combines strategic leadership with hands-on engineering — you will implement security yourself while empowering others to do so.
   

  

 You will act as the first-line technical security lead, defining guardrails, monitoring risks, and leading incident response. You will develop secure practices for coding with AI assistants, ensuring generated code meets security standards, avoids data leakage, and aligns with regulations. You will also communicate complex security concepts clearly across the organization.
   

  

**Location:** 
 Sveavägen 168, Stockholm, Sweden (On-site)
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
 Security Leadership
   

  

* Own and evolve Apotea’s security strategy across cloud, applications, and infrastructure.
* Translate business and regulatory requirements into sustainable security practices.
* Define guardrails, best practices, and reference implementations for teams.
